txt: Parkhowse, John, fellow Exeter Coll. 1500-19, B.A. 3 July, 1506, M.A. 7 June, 1510 (as Parkhurste); principal of Hart Hall 1506-10; canon of Exeter. See Boase, 28.
Barons, Christopher (Bernys), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1500, M.A. 8 March, 1507-8. See Boase, 28.

Duck, Richard (Dooke or Doke), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1501, M.A. (dispensed 3 July) 1510, proctor 1509, B.D. 19 June, 1515, D.D. (sup. 5 Nov.) 1516, vice-chancellor 1517, 1519, chaplain of Wolsey, canon of Exeter, archdeacon of Salisbury 1536, canon of Wells 1537, died before 2 Aug., 1539. See Le Neve, ii. 625; & Boase, 28.
Northcott, Richard, fellow Exeter Coll. 1502-11, M.A. 10 June, 1506, vicar of Long Wittenham, Berks, 1511. See Boase, 28.
Todde, Simon, fellow Exeter Coll. 1502-14, M.A. 7 Nov., 1508, rector of his college 1512-14. See Boase, 28.

Meade, Thomas (Meede), fellow Exeter Coll. 1503-18, B.A. 3 July, 1506, M.A. 8 May, 1509, principal of Hart Hall 1510-14, proctor 1513, rector of his college 1514-15 and 1516-18, one of the "custodes" of the queen's chest in the university July, 1510, vicar of Menheniot, Cornwall; died in 1529. See Boase, 28.

Kingdon, William (Kyngdon), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1504-14, B.A. 3 July, 1506, M.A. 8 May, 1509, auditor of Rothbury chest and guardian of queen's chest in summer 1513, rector of Endellion, Cornwall, 1533-4. See Boase, 29.

Rigge, John (or Rugge), fellow Exeter Coll. 1505, B.A. 3 July, 1506, M.A. 8 May, 1509, B.D. supd. 11 July, 1519, rector of his college 1515-16, auditor of Dunkam chest in summer 1515, rector of Honiton, Devon, and treasurer of Crediton; perhaps vicar of St. Thomas, near Exeter, 1528, until his death in 1537. See Boase, 29.
James, John (Jamys), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1506-20, B.A. 12 Feb., 1508-9, M.A. 10 Oct., 1511, auditor of queen's chest in summer 1513. See Boase, 29.
Davy, Thomas (or Davyd), fellow Exeter Coll. 1507, M.A. 8 May, 1509, one of these names vicar of Feock, Cornwall, 1521, died 1548. See Boase, 29.

Smale, Nicholas, fellow Exeter Coll. 1508, B.A. 12 Feb., 1508-9, M.A. 10 Oct., 1512, auditor of Fen (Vienna) chest 1513, rector of Clyst St. George, Devon, 1536, collated to rectory of Thenford, Northants, 1524, but renounced, rector of Wappenham 1525, canon of Lincoln 1526; died in 1553. See Boase, 29; & O.H.S. i. 63.

Irish, Thomas (Irysh), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1509-16, B.A. 2 July, 1509, M.A. 10 Oct., 1512, proctor 1517, auditor of Shelton and Warwyke chests in summer 1513, principal of Hart Hall 1514-22. See Boase, 29.

Moreman, John, B.A. 29 Jan., 1508-9; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1510-22, M.A. 10 Oct., 1512, B.D. sup. 18 Jan., 1526-7, D.D. 8 April, 1530, auditor of Dunkam chest in summer 1513, guardian of Nele and Cycester chests in winter 1518, principal of Hart Hall 1522-7 rector of Holy Trinity, Exeter, 1528-9, vicar of Midsomer Norton, Somerset, 1516, and of Menhenniot in Cornwall 1529. canon of Exeter 1544, vicar of Colebrook, Devon, 1546 until his death before Oct., 1554, said to have been dean of Exeter. See O.H.S. i. 63; Fasti, i. 82; Lansdowne MS. 980, f. 144b.; & Boase, 29.

Warren, John (Waryng), fellow Exeter Coll. 1511-20, B.A. 31 Jan., 1512-13, M.A. 5 Nov., 1515; perhaps vicar of St. Issy, Cornwall, 1517, rector of Lifton, Devon, rector of Roche, and vicar of Alternon, Cornwall, 1536. See Boase, 30.

Smithe, William (Smythe), fellow Exeter Coll. 1511-21, B.A. sup. 8 April, 1511, M.A. 5 Nov., 1515, rector of his college 1519-21, B.D. supl. 30 Nov., 1526, priest of St. Thomas in Salisbury 1533. See Boase, 30; & O.H.S. i. 76.
Allen, Thomas (Allyng), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1513, B.A. 3 July, 1514, M.A. 16 Dec., 1516. See Boase, 30.
Browne, Richard, fellow Exeter Coll. 1513-17, M.A. (sup.) 18 July, 1519. See Boase, 30.

Reskymer, William (or Reskemyr), B.A. supd. 25 March, 1511, fellow Exeter Coll. 1514-20, M.A. 5 Nov., 1515, auditor of queen's chest 1516, rector of Ladock, Cornwall, 1520, and vicar of Constantine 1536, until his death in 1558. See Boase, 30.
Poskins, William, B.A. 31 Jan., 1512-13; fellow Exeter Coll. 1514.

Bale, Philip, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1515, B.A. (sup. 30 June), 1516, M.A. 5 June, 1521, junior proctor 1524, sup. for B.D. 29 Jan., 1532-3, after twelve years' study), rector 1521-6, vice-rector (senior fellow) autumn 1529, rector of Honiton 1540, rector of Combe Raleigh, Devon, 1555, made his will 6 May, 1559, and proved 14 June following. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 30.
Willoughby, John (Wylughby), B.A. supd. 4 Nov., 1513, fellow Exeter Coll. 1515, M.A. 16 Dec., 1516; perhaps rector of Baverstock, Wilts, 1521, and of Haccombe, Devon, 1536. See Boase, 30.

Fletcher, Edmund (Flaacher), B.A. 2 July, 1515, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1516-29, M.A. (sup. 8 Nov.) 1518, chaplain of the university, B.D. (sup. 28 July), 1530, rector of his college 1526-9. See Boase, 31.
Lake, Thomas, B.A. 3 July, 1514, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1516, M.A. (sup. 8 Nov.), 1518, in holy orders. See Boase, 31.
Nicols, John, fellow Exeter Coll. 1518-23, B.A. 8 July, 1518, secular chaplain 1519; one of these names rector of Landewednack, Cornwall, 1536-49. See Boase, 31; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Chappel, Richard (Chapyll), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1518, B.A. 28 Feb., 1518-19, one of these names M.P. Grampound April-May, 1554, and Oct.-Dec., 1555. See Boase, 31.
Michell, Bartholomew, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1520-7, M.A. 26 Oct., 1521, B.D. sup. 10 Oct., 1533, fellow of Eton College 11 Jan., 1526-7, rector of Ludgvan, in Cornwall, 1536. See Boase, 31.
Moxhay, John (Moxsaye, or Moxe), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1520-8, M.A. 5 June, 1521, vicar of Pinhoe, Devon, 1527-8. admon. at Oxford 4 April, 1528, as Mocsey. See Boase, 31.
White, John (Whygth), B.A. 18 July, 1519; fellow Exeter Coll. 1520-3, M.A. 6 July, 1523; principal of Hart Hall 1527-31. See Boase, 31.
Martin, Richard (Mertyne), fellow Exeter Coll. 1520-3, B.A. 14 March, 1523-4, in orders. See Boase, 31.

Tucker, John (Toker, Tooker, or Towker), B.A. sup. 15 Jan., 1520-1, fellow Exeter Coll. 1521-6, M.A. 6 July, 1523, proctor 1525, canon of Cardinal Coll. 1529-30, admitted to practice medicine, 14 May 1530, B. and D.Med. 13 July, 1538. See Boase, 31; Gutch, i. 422; & O.H.S. i. 116.

Collins, John (Colyns), B.A. 5 Nov., 1520; fellow Exeter Coll. 1521-9, M.A. 6 July, 1523, in orders, perhaps rector of Sutton Mandeville, Wilts, 1531, and of Rushall 1537. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 32.
Bere, John (Beere), B.A. (sup. 20 June) 1517, M.A. (sup. 12 July) 1520; fellow Exeter Coll. 1521, rector 1529-31, rector of Endellion, in Cornwall, 1534-64, and of Cambourne 1542. See Boase, 31.
Cocks, Eurin (Cokys), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1521, B.A. 30 June, 1523, M.A. 9 Nov., 1526, guardian of Burnell chest in summer 1527. See Boase, 32.
Carslegh, Stephen (Casleye or Caslegh), B.A. 25 Feb., 1521-2; fellow Exeter Coll. 1522, M.A. (sup. 16 Feb.) 1524-5, B.Med. (sup. in Mich. term) 1541, after studying 12 years. See Boase, 32.
Ford, Thomas, fellow Exeter Coll. 1522-6, B.A. 30 June, 1523. See Boase, 32.

Peter, (Sir) William (Petrer or Petur), originally of Exeter Coll.; fellow of All Souls' Coll. 1523, B.C.L. and B.Can.L. 2 July, 1526, D.C.L. 17 Feb., 1532-3, the second founder of Exeter college (s. John, a rich tanner of Torbryan, Devon), principal of Peckwater's Inn, one of the visitors of religious houses, at their dissolution, master of the requests, secretary and privy councillor to Henry VIII. and Edward VI., and to Q. Mary, and knighted, subtreasurer and treasurer "of the first fruits and tenths" temp. Edw. VI., chancellor of the order of the garter, and P.C. to Q. Elizabeth, "had been seven times ambassador in foreign countries;" died 13 Jan., 1571, buried in the church of Ingarston, Essex, 11 Feb., following. See Foster's Peerage; & Fasti, i. 93.

Pekyns, John, B.A. 27 July, 1523, fellow Exeter Coll. 1524, M.A. 9 Nov., 1526, proctor 1533, B.D. sup. 26 March, 1534, rector of his college 1531-4, canon of Westminster 1543, rector of Bradwell-juxta-Mare, Essex, 1542, until deprived before 1 May, 1554. See Boase, 32; Fasti, i. 74; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Baylye, James, fellow Exeter Coll. 1526-39, B.A. 2 July, 1526, M.A. 5 July, 1529, sub-rector 1535, one of these names vicar of Preshute, Wilts, 1533, and of Burnham, Somerset, 1538, and of West Harptree 1543, fellow of Eton 1554. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 32.

Berry, John (Byrry or Bury), B.A. 30 June, 1523; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1526-36, M.A. 9 Nov., 1526, B.D. 14 June, 1543, rector 1534-6; vicar of Exmouth 1536, died in 1558. See Boase, 32; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Cholwell, William (Chollwill or Chalwell), B.A. 27 Feb., 1526-7; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1527-36, M.A. 5 July, 1529, B.D. (sup. 30 March) 1555, vicar of Colyton Rawleigh, Devon, 1548, deprived 1556, rector of Southill, Cornwall, 1551. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 32.
Lee, Edward (or Ley), B.A. 30 June, 1523, fellow Exeter Coll. 1527-30, M.A. 10 Feb., 1527-8, rector of Sowton, Devon, 1530, vicar of Bramford Speke 1529; died 1540. See Boase, 33.

Dottin, John (Dotting, Dotyn or Dottyng), B.A. 1 Aug., 1524; fellow Exeter Coll. 1528-39, M.A. 5 July, 1529, B.Med. (sup. Feb.), 1541-2, 'admitted to' practice 16 July, 1542,' D.Med. (sup. 1 June) 1559, rector of his college 1537-9, vicar of Bampton, Oxon, 1534-58, and of St. Issy, Cornwall, 1543, canon of Exeter, rector of Whitstone, Cornwall, and of Aveton Gifford, Devon, 1554, rector of Kingsdon in Ilchester, Somerset, 1558, until his death 7 Nov., 1561. See Boase, 33; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Saunders, William (Sawnders), probably fellow Exeter Coll. 1529, B.A. 7 Feb., 1529-30, M.A. 29 Nov., 1532; perhaps rector of Hazelbury Bryan, Dorset, 1544, etc. See Boase, 33; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Edgecombe, Thomas (Eggecumbe or Eggcombe), fellow Exeter Coll. 1529-36, B.A. 12 Nov., 1527, M.A. 19 June, 1531, fellow Eton Coll. 1536, in orders. See Boase, 33.
Marshall, Robert, fellow Exeter Coll. 1529, B.A. 7 Feb., 1529-30; perhaps rector of Nymet Tracey, Devon, 1536. See Boase, 33.
Frenche, John, B.A. 13 July, 1530, fellow Exeter Coll. 1530-44, M.A. 22 Nov., 1533, B.D. 26 May, 1543, principal Hart Hall 1535-41, rector of his college 1539-42, chaplain of Eton. See Boase, 34.
Lawrence, Henry, B.A. 7 Feb., 1529-30; fellow Exeter Coll. 1530-43, M.A. 29 Nov., 1532, in holy orders, rector of his college 1541-3; died 24 June, 1545. See Boase, 33.
Marton, Richard, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1530-8, B.A. sup. Dec., 1532; one of these names rector of Oare, Somerset, 1554, etc. See Boase, 34; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Lawes, William (Lawce, Lause or Lawys), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1531-7, B.A. sup. June, 1532, M.A. 14 Nov., 1535, vicar of St. Gennis, Cornwall, 1548. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Boase, 34.

Crosse, Augustine, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1532-46, B.A. 29 Nov., 1532, M.A. 14 Nov., 1535, rector 1543-6, judge on the peace outside the East Gate — July, 1536, fellow of Eton College 1547, vicar of Modbury, Devon, 1552, and of Dorney, Bucks, 1553, rector of Sturminster Marshall, Dorset, 1559. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 34.
Lillington, John (Lyllyngton), B.A. 5 Feb., 1534-5; fellow Exeter Coll. 1535-40, M.A. 7 July, 1539; died 20 April, 1540. See Boase, 34.

Moore, William, from Devon, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1537, B.A. 13 Feb., 1537-8, M.A. 6 Dec., 1541, principal of Hart Hall 1544-5, rector of his college 1546-53, rector of Stoke Rivers, Devon, 1551, etc. See Boase, 34; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Tremayne, John, fellow Exeter Coll. 1537-41, B.A. 13 Feb., 1537-8; possibly brother of Richard. See Boase, 35.
Endall, Robert (or Yendall), B.A. 23 Feb., 1537-8; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1538, M.A. 6 Dec., 1541, vicar of Menhenniot, Cornwall, 1554. See Foster's Index Eccl. & O.H.S. i. 190.
Nanconon, Thomas, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1538-46, B.A. 13 May, 1538, M.A. 6 Dec., 1541. See Boase, 35.
Peter, John, B.A. 20 April, 1537; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1538.

Vivian, Thomas, fellow Exeter Coll. 1539-49, B.A. 6 Dec., 1541, M.A. 9 Oct., 1544, B.D. 18 July, 1552, D.D. sup. 1557-8; principal of Hart Hall 1545-8, vicar of St. Just in Penwith 1548, and rector of Philleigh, Cornwall, 1552. See Boase, 35; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Harward, Roger (or Hawerde), B.A. 18 Feb., 1538-9 fellow of Exeter Coll. 1539-58, M.A. Mich. term 1543, vicar of Poundstock, Cornwall, 1549. See Boase, 35; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Pruett, John (or Prewett), B.A. 18 Feb., 1538-9; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1539-43, M.A. Michaelmas term 1543. See Boase, 35.
Prewett, John, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1539. See Pruet.

Collins, John (Collyns, Colyns, or Colence), B.A. (sup.) 1539-40; fellow Exeter Coll. 1540, M.A. (Mich. term) 1543, B.Med., and admitted to practice 10 March, 1558-9, D.Med. (sup. May) 1566, in orders; rector of St. Juste, Cornwall, 1543, etc. See Boase, 36; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Dagle, John (Dangell or Dagell), fellow Exeter Coll. 1541-3, B.A. 7 April 1544, portioner of Bampton, Oxon, 1549, vicar of Morval, Cornwall, 1549, of Bodmin 1550, and of Stoke St. Gabriel, Devon, 1554, canon of Bodmin Priory, buried 15 Dec., 1564. See Boase, 36.
Grylles, William, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1541-51, B.A. 6 Dec., 1541, M.A. 9 Oct., 1544. See Boase, 36, 40.
Whetcombe, John (Whetcum or Wheatecumbe), B.A. 17 Feb., 1538-9, M.A. 1543, fellow Exeter Coll. 1542; rector of Stockleigh English, Devon, 1549, as Whitcombe. See Boase, 36.

Fessard, John (Fesserd or Fesard), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1543-4, B.A. 17 Jan., 1543-4, M.A. 13 July, 1554, chantry priest of Mere, Wilts, 1543, vicar of Tisbury, Wilts, 1544-65, rector of Donhead St. Mary 1555, deprived 1565, rector of Shafton, Holy Trinity, Dorset, 1556, vicar of Great Fontmell, Dorset, 1559. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Boase, 36.
Talcarne, Robert (Talcaryn or Tolcarne), fellow Exeter Coll. 1543-51, B.A. 24 July, 1545, M.A. 4 Feb., 1547-8. See Boase, 36.
Gay, Nicolas, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1543, B.A. 17 Jan., 1543-4, M.A. 1547-8. See Boase, 36.

Taynter, Robert (Teynter, or Tenter), B.A. 13 Nov., 1542; fellow Exeter Coll. 1544-6, M.A. supd. 1549, B.D. 22 Feb., 1554-5; rector of Fonthill Gifford, Wilts, 1550, of Tydd St. Mary, co. Lincoln, 1554, vicar of Winscomb, Somerset, 1554, and of Selbourne 1556, and rector of East Tisted, Hants, 1560. See Boase, 37; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Randall, Philip, s. Thomas, of Lamerton, Devon; fellow Exeter Coll. 1544-57, B.A. 24 July, 1545, M.A. 4 Feb., 1547-8, B.Med.; rector of his college 1556-7; principal of Hart Hall 1549, until his death 11 March, 1598-9; buried in the church of St. Peter-in-the-East, Oxford. See Bloxam, iv. 92; & Boase, 36.
Hill, Thomas, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1546-9, B.A. (sup. Mich. term), 1546. See Boase, 37; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Lee, Maurice, an Irishman (Ley or Lye), B.A. 1545, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1547-8, M.A. 4 Feb., 1547-8. See Boase, 37.
Ley, Maurice (Lee or Lye), fellow Exeter Coll. 1547-8, B.A. 1545, M.A. 4 Feb., 1547-8. See Boase, 37.
Reynolds, Henry (Raynold), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1547-51, B.A. supd. 1548-9. See Boase, 37.

Newton, Robert, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1548; B.A. supd. 1552, M.A. 1 July, 1557; rector of his college 1557-9, and 1570-8, B.D. 14 Feb., 1575-6, after 20 years in theology, rector of Bugbrooke, Northants, 1560. See Gutch, i. 518; Fasti, i. 152; Boase, 38; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Collins, John (Collings or Collinges), B.A.; fellow Exeter Coll. 1549-62, M.A. 1553, 12 years in theology, sup. for licence to preach 8 July and 9 Nov., 1572, one of these names vicar of Holbeton 1554, rector of Huish 1563, and of Doddiscombleigh, Devon, 1566. See Boase, 38; O.H.S., xii. 24; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Marks, Stephen (Markes or Markis), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1549-56, B.A. sup. 1552, M.A. 11 July, 1554, B.D. sup. 10 Oct., 1559, rector of his college 1555-6, one of the original fellows of Trinity Coll. 1556-60. See Boase, 38; & Gutch, i. 518.
Crispen, Roger (Crispine), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1550-6; B.A. 8 Dec., 1554, fellow of Trinity Coll. 1556-62, M.A. 8 July, 1558, 'sup. June, 1562, for B.Med. and leave to practice. See Boase, 39.

Re(a)de, Richard, fellow Exeter Coll. 1551, deprived 1559 B.A. 8 Dec., 1554, B.C.L. 21 Feb., 1558-9; one of these names vicar of Coleridge, Devon, 1554. See Boase, 39; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
James, Edward, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1551-7, B.A. 9 Dec., 1553, probably vicar of Carhayes, Cornwall, 1573, of Bovey Tracey, Devon, 1576-7, etc. See Boase, 39; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Daniel, Reginald, fellow Exeter Coll. 1551-6, vicar of Sancreed, Cornwall, 1553. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 39.
Meredith, Hercules (Ameredith), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1551, B.C.L. sup. Oct., 1564.
Martin, Thomas (Morton or Marton), fellow Exeter Coll. 1552, B.A. 9 Dec., 1554; one of these names beneficed in Essex. See Boase, 39; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Martyn, John, fellow Exeter Coll. 6 Dec., 1552, B.A. 1553; perhaps vicar of Somerton, Somerset, 1554. See Boase, 39; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Evans, Roger, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1553-6, B.A. (sup. April), 1555; fellow of Trinity Coll. 1556-9, M.A. (sup. 8 April), 1559, rector of Bridestowe, Devon, 1571. See Boase, 40; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Farrant, James, Fellow of Exeter Coll. 1553, B.A. 8 Dec., 1554; died 31 Jan., 1556-7. See Boase, 40.

Dottin, Henry (or Dotinge), fellow Exeter Coll. 1554-60; B.A. (sup. 25 Jan.) 1555-6, M.A. 31 Jan., 1559-60, vicar of Bampton, Oxon, 1559, and perhaps rector of Stokeinteignhead, Devon, 1569. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 40.
Spoure, Sampson (Spoore), fellow Exeter Coll. 1554-7, B.A. supd. 25 Jan., 1555-6. See Boase, 40.

Woodroffe, William, fellow Exeter Coll. 1555-9, B.A.; vicar of Collumpton, Devon, 1559, and of Lydeard St. Lawrence, (both) Somerset, 1561, until his death in 1573. See Boase, 40; & Foster's Index Eccl.]

Neale, John (Nele or Neele), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1556, until deprived by the queen's visitors 1570, B.A. 14 Dec., 1557, M.A. 28 Nov., 1560, rector of his college (as B.A.) 1560-3 and 1566, until deprived 12 Oct., 1570, fellow of St. John's Coll. See Boase, 40; & Fasti, i. 152.

Fountaine, Richard (Fontaine or Funtainet), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1556-59, B.A. (sup. May) 1556, M.A. 15 Feb., 1559-60, vicar of Brent, Devon, 1561, of Loddeswell 1573, canon of Exeter 1573. See Boase, 41; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Spicer, Richard (Spiser), fellow Exeter Coll. 1556-7, and 1562-7, B.A. 1 Feb., 1558-9, M.A. 24 July, 1563, probationary fellow Merton Coll. 1562, rejected 1563. See Boase, 41; & O.H.S. iv. 265.
Smale, Christopher, fellow Exeter Coll. 1556-75, B.A. 3 March, 1558-9, M.A. 24 July, 1563, resigned his fellowship rather than take the degree of B.D. See Boase, 41.
Pinch, Thomas (Pynche), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1556-72, B.A. 14 Dec., 1557, chaplain 1559-72, M.A. 24 July, 1563. See Boase, 40.

Kempthorne, Thomas (Kimpthorne), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1557-60, B.A. 3 March, 1558-9 (3s. John Ley, als. Kempthorne), vicar of Morwenstow, Cornwall, 1560, until his death, buried there 29 April, 1594. See Boase, 41; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Napper, (Sir) Robert, 3s. James, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1559-66, B.A. 29 Oct., 1562, student of Middle Temple 1565 (as s. James, of Swyre, Dorset, gent.), lord chief baron of the exchequer, Ireland, 1593, and knighted 1593, sheriff of Dorset 1606, purchased the estate of Middlemarsh, M.P. Dorchester 1586-7, Bridport 1601, Wareham 1604-11; died 20 Sept., 1615; father of Nathaniel 1602. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.; Boase, 42; & Fasti, i. 161.

Bray, Richard (Braie), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1559-64, B.A. 4 Dec., 1561; fellow of All Souls' Coll. 1564, B.C.L. 19 Aug., 1566, D.C.L. (sup. Oct.) 1573, principal of New Inn Hall 1570-1. See Boase, 42.
Pollarde, William, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1559-65, B.A. 4 Dec., 1561; student of Inner Temple 1563, as of Horwood, Devon. See Boase, 42; & Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Sheprey, William (Shepperee), fellow Exeter Coll. 1559-64 and 1566-8, B.A. 4 Dec., 1561. See Ath. i. 669; & Boase, 42.
Babbe, John, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1559, B.A. 14 Dec., 1561, M.A. (sup.) 10 March, 1564-5. See Boase, 42.

Paynter, William (Painter), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1560-75, B.A. 4 Dec., 1561, M.A. 14 April, 1565, B.C.L. 18 Feb., 1569-70; rector of Halstowe, Kent, 1564, and of Swyre, Dorset, 1567. See Boase, 42; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Bellew, John, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1561, B.A. 10 May, 1563, M.A. 4 July, 1566 (son of William, of Ash in Brampton and Alverdiscott, Devon), a priest of Bratton Fleming, buried at Monkleigh 20 April, 1622. See Boase, 43.
Risdon, Edward, fellow Exeter Coll. 1561-4, B.A. 29 Oct., 1562, M.A. 17 May, 1566, rector of Mawgan, Cornwall, 1562, and of Sutcombe, Devon, 1564. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Ath. i. 513.

Wyatt, William (Wyett or Wiotte), fellow Exeter Coll. 1562, B.A. 23 July, 1563, fellow 1564, M.A. 17 May, 1566, sub-rector 1574, B.D. 14 Feb., 1575-6; rector of Whitestaunton, Somerset, 1576, and of Tawstock, Devon, 4 June, 1577, until his death 5 March, 1577-8. See Gutch, ii. 169; Boase, 43; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, John, fellow Exeter Coll. 1564-72, from Cornwall, B.A. 6 April, 1566. M.A. 21 Nov., 1569; a teacher in the country 1569. See Boase, 44.
Creed, Giles (Crede), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1564-6, vicar of St. Minver's, Cornwall, 1577-93, buried 3 April, 1593. See Boase, 44.
Westlake, Reimund (Westlacke), fellow Exeter Coll. 1564-80, B.A. 6 April, 1566, M.A. 21 Nov., 1569. See Boase, 44.
Randall, Peter, fellow Exeter Coll. 1564-83, B.A. 18 April, 1567, M.A. 16 Feb., 1571-2. See Boase, 43.

Chardon, John (Carden or Cardon), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1565-8, from Devon, B.A. 18 April, 1567, M.A. 27 March, 1572, B.D. 15 Nov., 1581, D. D. 14 April, 1586, vicar of Heavitree, Devon, 1571, and of Colbroke 1573, canon of Exeter 1581, rector of Tedburn St. Mary 1581, bishop of Down and Connor 1596, rector of Cahir 1596, warden of the College of Youghal 1598, died in 1601. See Boase, 44; Ath., i. 715, ii. 845; Cotton's Fasti Ecc. Hib., iii. 204; Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & D.N.B.
Sim(p)son, John, fellow Exeter Coll. 1565, from diocese of Sarum, B.A. 18 April, 1567, M.A. 5 Dec., 1570; will at Oxford proved 10 Sept., 1577. See Boase, 44.

Lewkenor, Edmund (Lukener), fellow St. John's Coll., Cambridge, from Sussex, 1563; B.A. 1562-3 incorporated 1 July, 1566, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1566-77, M.A. 21 April, 1567 (perhaps s. Edward, groom porter, who died in the Tower 1556). See Boase, 45; & Cooper, ii. 251.

Howlett, John, of Rutlandshire; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1566-70, B.A. 26 June, 1566, M.A. 21 Nov., 1569, became a Jesuit at Louvain 1571, aged 24, laboured in Transylvania and at Wilna 1589, where he died 17 (Sept.) Dec., 1589. See Fasti, i. 184; Boase, 45; & D.N.B.
Reynolds, James, fellow Exeter Coll. 1566, B.A. 29 Nov., 1569, M.A. 20 June, 1573, college reader 1577; brother of William 1572, etc.; inventory, 21 Oct., 1577. See Griffiths' Index, & Boase, 45.
Battishall, Henry (Batsill or Batsell), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1566-73, B.A. 29 Nov., 1569, M.A. 26 June, 1572, held a benefice; rector of Lifton, Devon, 1571. See Foster's Index & Boase, 44.
Carter, Kenelm, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1566-83, B.A. 18 Feb., 1565-6, M.A. 21 Nov., 1569. See Boase, 45.

Le(a)ch, John, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1567-77, from Devon, B.A. sup. 14 May, 1567, M.A. 5 Dec., 1570, B.D. 14 Feb., 1575-6, sup. for licence to preach 1576, rector of Washfield, Devon, 1574, of Tallaton 1576, canon and chancellor of Exeter 1583; died 1613. See Foster's Index Eccl.; Vivian's Cornwall, 283; & Boase, 45.
Batt, John (Bate), fellow of Exeter Coll. 1567-79, from Devon, B.A. 24 Nov., 1570, M.A. 27 June, 1573. See Boase, 45.

Sherwin, Ralph, fellow Exeter Coll. 1568-75, B.A. 22 Nov., 1571, M.A. 2 July, 1574; turned Roman Catholic, made a priest at Douay 23 March, 1576-7, refused the oath of supremacy, and was hanged, drawn and quartered at Tyburn with Edmund Campion 1 Dec., 1581. See Ath. i. 478; Lansdowne MS. 982, f. 25; Boase, 46; & Memoirs of Missionary Priests.

Cliff, Nicolas, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1568-84, from Devon, B.A. 22 Nov., 1571, M.A. 2 July, 1574, B.D. 7 Dec., 1584, sup. for licence to preach 23 March, 1590-1, rector of Rewe, Devon, 1585-90, vicar of Maiden Newton. Dorset 1586. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 45.

Carpenter, Robert, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1568-79, B.A. 22 Nov., 1571, M.A. 18 June, 1575, one of these names M.P. Rye 1575-83, 1584-5, 1586-7, 1588-9, and 1593. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary & Boase, 45.
Hole, Thomas (Hoole), B.A. 22 Nov., 1571, M.A. 2 July, 1574, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1568, from Devon, removed in 1579 for absence at the University of Paris. See Boase, 46; & O.H.S. xii. 9.

Cogan, Edmund, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1570, B.A. 3 April, 1574, expelled 1579 for breach of statutes, letters of administration at Oxford granted for a bachelor of arts of these names 4 Oct., 1639. See Boase, 46.

Dunne, William, B.A. 9 Feb., 1569-70; fellow of Exeter Coll. 1571-83, M.A. 20 June 1573, B. Med. and licenced to practice medicine 27 Feb., 1579-80, D.Med. 21 July, 1582 (youngest son of Robert, of London), fellow College of Physicians 1592, Lumleian lecturer in Dec., 1602. See Boase, 46; Munk, l. 102.
Cowper, George, B.A. 3 April, 1574, M.A. 22 May, 1577 (Cooper, paup.), scholar Exeter Coll. in 1572.
Paynter, Henry, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1573, B.A. 1 July, 1573, M.A. 27 June, 1577, vicar of Seaton, Devon, 1612. See Boase, 46; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Cory, John (Curre or Curye), B.A. 15 Nov., 1570; fellow Exeter Coll. 1573-78, M.A. 2 July, 1574. See Ath., i. 478; & Boase, 46.

Dalison, (Sir) Roger, of co. Lincoln. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16 (as arm.); of Gray's Inn 1577 (eldest son of William), lieut.-general of the ordnance, knighted 23 April, 1603, M.P. Malmesbury 1604-11 and 1614, created a baronet 29 June, 1611, died about 1620, brother of the next named, father of Thomas and Edward 1613. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg. & Parliamentary Dictionary.

Mercer, Nicholas (Mersor), pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17; B.A. 11 Feb., 1574-5, fellow 1577-86, M.A. 14 March, 1578-9, licenced to preach 1 July, 1586, canon of Exeter 1583, vicar of Bishops Nympton 1585, rector of (Pitts portion) Tiverton 1591, vicar of St. Pancras, near Lyme, Devon, 1581, until his death in 1597. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Boase, 47.

Marks, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; B.A. 13 March, 1575-6, M.A. 14 March, 1578-9; one of these names rector of Gayton, Northants, 1583, until his death, buried there 17 March, 1633, aged 81; Gayton is however in the gift of Sydney Sussex Coll., Cambridge. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Eveleighe, John, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; fellow 1578-93, B.A. 11 July, 1581, M.A. 4 June, 1584; (incorporated at Cambridge 1585), proctor 1590, principal of Hart Hall 1599, until his death, buried in Magdalen chapel, Oxon, 10 Aug., 1604; probably 2s. John, of Holcombe. See Boase, 47.

Bampfylde, Amias, (s. Richard) of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15; of Poltimore, Devon, a student of the Middle Temple 1576, M.P. Devon 1597-8, knighted at Windsor 9 July, 1603, died 9 Feb., 1625-6, father of the next named and of Edward 1616. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Brette, (Sir) Alexander, of Somerset. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17 (as gent.); a student of Inner Temple 1575, late of Lyon's Inn, gent., as of White Stanton, Somerset, knighted 20 June, 1603; see George same date. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg. & Collinson's Somerset, iii. 543.

Hele, Ellis (Heale), of Devon, gen. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17; of Bovy Tracy, Devon, bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1590, treasurer 1614-15 (1s. Walter), of Brixton, Devon); died 11 Jan., 1635-6; buried at All Hallows, Goldsmith Street, Exeter, M.I. Exeter cathedral.

Hele, John (Heale), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1587, bencher 1601; his parentage is doubtful, though probably eldest son of Walter, of Hele, Devon. See Foster's Judges and Barristers; Vivian's Devon Visitations; & D.N.B.

Davilles, Philip, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., (matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19) B.A. 18 March, 1573-4 (son of William Daviles, of Morland, Devon), baptized at Parkburn 29 Dec., 1551, and buried at Braunton 25 April, 1559. See Vivian's Devon Visitations.

Huish, William (Huyshe), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19; fellow 1579-93, B.A. 13 July, 1582, M.A. 27 June, 1584, rector of Kilkhampton, Cornwall, 1592, and canon of Wells 1593. See Boase, 48; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Tuckar, John, of Cornwall. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20, fellow 1578-83, B.A. 11 July, 1581, M.A. 7 July, 1584; perhaps rector of Helland 1580, and of Cardinham, Cornwall, 1583, died 1602. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Boase, 47.

Stourton, John, Lord, of Wilts, Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20, "dialecticus"; 8th Baron Stourton, restored in blood 1575 (s. Charles, 7th lord hanged 6th March, 1557); died s.p. 13 Oct., 1588; brother of Charles and Edward.

Cornelius, John (or Cornellis), born of Irish parents at Bodmin, in Cornwall; fellow Exeter Coll. 1575, expelled by royal commissioners 3 Aug., 1578, for popery, 'Cornelius, alias Mohun, was hanged at Dorchester 4 July, 1594.' See Boase, 46; & D.N.B.

Stourton, Charles (Stowrton), of Wilts, baronis fil. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14, B.A. supd. 15 Dec., 1576; his father Charles, Lord Stourton, was however hanged 16 March, 1557-8; brother of Edward and John same date.

Eveleighe, Richard, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19; a student of Middle Temple 1577, (as 3s. of John, of Ottery, Devon, esq.); buried at St. Martin, Exeter, 12 June, 1605. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Browne, John, of Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; (? paup. schol. circa 1572), a student of the Middle Temple 1575 (? knighted 1603), father of John 1598, and of Robert 1602. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Leighe, Henry, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19; perhaps B.A. Cambridge, supl. for incorporation 27 Jan., 1578-9, of Hart Hall; one of these names rector of Colmworth, Beds, 1603. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Ayscoughe, Roger, of co. Lincoln. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; perhaps Sir Roger, of Nuthall, Notts, son of Sir Francis, who was knighted at the winning of Boulogne, 37 Henry VIII., and grandfather of James.

Stourton, Edward (Stowrton), of Dorset, baronis fil. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; student of Gray's Inn 1573; perhaps licenced 12 Dec., 1579, to marry Mary Stafford, spinster. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.

Coode, Arthur, of Cornwall. Exeter Coll., matric.entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 22; B.A. 11 Feb., 1576-7. Arthur, 3rd son of Walter, of Morval, baptized there 23 June, 1547, was rector of Tavistock, and brother of Gilbert 1573.

Griffithe, Rice, of Northants. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1578 (as Griffin), son of Edward Griffin who was nephew of Robert Thornborough. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Digby, John, of Rutland. Exeter Coll., matric.entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14; of Lincoln's Inn 1577, formerly of Barnard's Inn, probably of Seaton, Rutland, youngest son of Kenelm. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Dister, William, of Middlesex, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17 (? of Hart Hall 1572); of the Middle Temple 1575, as son and heir of John, of London, esq. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Harris, Arthur (Harrys), of Devon Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; student of Lincoln's Inn 1578; either of Hayne or of Cherston, Devon, probably the former. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Brette, George, of Somerset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; a student of Inner Temple 1575, as of White Stanton, Somerset, see Alexander same date. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Wallgrave, Nicholas, of Middlesex. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; of Borley, student of Middle Temple 1580, as 2s. of Edward, of Borley, Essex, kt. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Wyatt, John (Wyot), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1587, as of Braunton, Devon; father of Philip. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Harris, Francis (Harrys), of Hants. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 25; student of Middle Temple 1578, as 2nd son of John, of Itchen Abbas, Hants. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Gerarde, John, of co. Derby, eq. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 13; brother of Thomas same date. See D.N.B., where he is described as 2s. John, of Bryn, co. Lancaster.
Re(a)de, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll. matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 21; one of these names rector of Meshaw 1580-1603, and of Beaford, Devon, 1583-1608. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Borlase, Nicholas (Burlace), of Cornwall. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; (son of John, of Newlyn) a recusant, died 5 July, 1620. See Genealogist, vol. v., n.s., 29.
Moore, George, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20; perhaps rector of Martyn (or Merton), Devon, 1576, and father of George 1606. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Potter, Thomas, of Devon. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; student of Middle Temple 1577, as 2s. Thomas, of Broadhembury, Devon, gent. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Smithe, Nicholas, of London, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1581. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg. & Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.
Fulforde, Robert, of Devon. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18, "Grammaticus" (2s. Sir John, of Fulford, Devon, knight); buried at Paignton, Devon, 21 Dec., 1619.
Worseley, Thomas, of Hants. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15; of Apuldrecombe, I.W. (s. of John); died 1604, father of Richard and John 1605, and Francis 1608.
Anne, Gervys, of Yorks. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17; of Thorpe, Yorks, his will proved in London 20 Sept., 1606. See Foster's Yorkshire Collection.
Treffry, Nicholas (Trefrie), of Cornwall. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15; one of these names rector of Swyre, Dorset, 1606. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Pawlie, Thomas, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17; fellow 1578-95, B.A. 13 July, 1582, M.A. 10 July, 1584. See Boase, 47.
Deane, Thomas, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 21; rector of Milton Damerel, Devon, 1578. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Pettit, Henry, of Kent, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19; perhaps student of Gray's Inn 1574. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Horseman, Paul, of Oxon, gen. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14; student of Lincoln's Inn 1577. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Moyle, Thomas, of Kent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; possibly a student of Gray's Inn 1580. See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.
Tregrosse, John, of Cornwall. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; perhaps of St. Keverne (s. Richard), and died 28 Feb., 1602.
Hill, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; (perhaps B.A. 14 Feb., 1576-7). See Foster's Index Eccl.
Habington, Richard, of co. Worcester, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec. 1575, aged 13. See Nash's Worcestershire, i. 588.
Sargeant, William (Sergeant), of co. Stafford, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18, B.A. 27 Jan., 1581-2.
Catesbie, Kenelm, of Rutland, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19; of Seaton, Rutland, son of Michael.
Pascall, Andrew (Paskall), of Essex. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14; probably knighted 23 July, 1603.
Gerarde, Thomas, of co. Derby, eq. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15; brother of John same date.
Sandwithe, Edward, of Cumberland, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 27; paup. schol. circa 1572.
Crandon, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16; a paup. scholar, circa 1572.
Browne, John, of co. Derby, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19 (? paup. schol. circa 1572).
Kitte, Kenelm, of Rutland, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20; sup. for B.A. 4 July, 1581.
Hatche, Edmund, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15; s. Lewis, of Aller, Devon.
Kempe, Moyle, of Kent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18; 3s. Sir Thomas, of Wye, Kent, kt.
Thorne, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17, paup. schol. circa 1572.
Turnar, Christopher, of Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20, paup. schol. 1572.
Lendall, Richard, of Berks. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19; B.A. 16 Feb., 1576-7.
Mainwaring, George (or Manering), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 21.
Conybeare, John, of Devon, pleb. (or Coniber). Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20.
Richardson, John (als. Joyner), of Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15.
Seward, Tricheus (Zewarde), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Bedlowe, Anthony, of Devon, 'dialecticus.' Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 22.
Hughes, Thomas (Hewes), of London, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Baron, George, of co. Lancaster, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 26.
Boys, William (Boyes), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20.
Davies, Giles (Davys), of Devon. pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Saltar, Nicholas, of Northants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Yke, Nicholas, of co. Stafford, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Bawden, Nicholas, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19.
Fountayne, Nicholas, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20.
Colley, John, of co. Rutland, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Berington, Thomas, of Berks, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17.
Orton, Thomas, of Northants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16.
Whe(e)ler, Thomas, of Bucks, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19.
Grose, Thomas, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575; aged 19.
Owen, Christopher, of Oxon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 13.
Parsons, Richard, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 23.
Stre(e)te, Henry, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15.
Allen, Henry, of Northants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17.
Barrett, Edward, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15.
Cliffe, Richard, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14.
Kitcham, William, of Devon, gen. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Osmonde, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19.
Pottinger, Simon, of Hants, or Southants. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575.
Thomas, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Bicklie, Ralph, of Hants. gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17.
Foxwell, Henry, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17.
Savage, John, of Rutland, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17.
Weste, Richard, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 21.
Belson, Thomas, of Oxon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17.
Hobby, Philip, of Hants, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 15.
Yollowe, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 18.
Yonge, Robert, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16.
Austen, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19.
Baker, Henry, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 21.
Weekes, John, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20.
Owen, Thomas, of Oxon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14.
Ridge, John, of Derby, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 22.
Webbe, John, of Wilts, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 16.
Hill, John, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 22.
Stanney, Thomas, of Sussex. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 17.
Mordaunt, Edmund, of Beds. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 20.
Warren, William, of Wilts. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19.
Hoorde, Andrew, of Somerset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575.
Peckam, George, of Bucks. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14.
Trigot, Thomas, of Yorks. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 14.
Tindall, John, of Yorks. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 3 Dec., 1575, aged 19.
Joyner, John, of Exeter Coll., matric. 1575. See Richardson.

Bawden, William, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 16; S.J. 1590, rector of the College of Louvain 1621, and of St. Omer's College 1622, until his death there 28 Sept., 1632. See Foley's Records, iii. 501-20, vii. 42; & D.N.B.

Plowden, Francis (Ployden), of Oxon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 13; student of Middle Temple 1582, as 2s. Edmund, of Shiplake, Oxon ('serjeant-at-law'); died 11 Dec., 1652, aged 90; buried at Shiplake. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Skinner, Anthony, of co. Warwick, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1580, as son and heir of William, of Rowington, co. Warwick. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Bret, Arthur, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric.entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 16; (? a student of Inner Temple 1579, as of White Stanton, Somerset). See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Endicot, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 19; fellow 1579-80, died 1582. See Boase, 48.
Kinde, Thomas (Kindye or Rindge) (in Chester), of Hants, gen. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 1577, aged 35.
Warren, Hugh, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 18, B.A. 7 July, 1581.
Hawles, John (Hawle), of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 14.
Hawle(s), Thomas, of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 17.
Napper, Richard, of Exeter, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date 20 Dec., 1577, aged 17.
Orford, William, fellow Exeter Coll. 1580-1614, B.A. 7 June, 1580, M.A. 3 May, 1583, B.D. 4 July, 1594, supd. for licence to preach 2 May, 1595, rector of Clist Hydon, Devon. See Boase, 48.

Burton, Thomas, of co. Lincoln. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Nov., 1581, aged 13, serviens; B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 17 Feb., 1586-7, M.A. 15 May, 1594, B.D. 8 July, 1602, sup. for licence to preach 30 Oct., 1602, incorp. at Cambridge 1603, said to have kept school 1589, one of these names canon of Lincoln 1603, rector of Middleton Stoney, Oxon, 1604, of Botheby Pagnell 1606, and of Barkstone, co. Lincoln, 1606. See Foster's Index.

Ridgeways, (Sir) Thomas (Rydgeways), of Devon, gent. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 15; student of Inner Temple 1583, as of Tor Mohun, Devon, gent. (s. Thomas), knighted in 1600, and created a baronet 25 Nov., 1612, a baron 1616, and Earl of Londonderry 23 Aug., 1622, M.P. Devon 1604-11; brother of George, etc. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

James, Gerentius (or Gerence), of Devon. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Nov., 1581, aged 13, "serviens"; probably B.A. 8 Feb., 1604-5, M.A. 8 July, 1608 (then in orders); vicar of Pateshull, Northants (upper or Dunstable portion), 1605-8; rector of Tiffield 1617-32, rector of Paulerspury 1625; buried at Tiffield 7 Jan., 1645-6. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Pallawin, James, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 20; B.A. 7 July, 1584, fellow 1584-1601, M.A. 26 June, 1587, B.D. 7 Dec., 1597, vicar of Keyrne alias St. Keverne, Cornwall, 1598, and of Brailes, co. Warwick, 1612. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Boase, 49.

Gascoigne, (Sir) William, of Yorks. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date circa 1581, aged 12 (as arm.); a student of Middle Temple 1583 (as son and heir of Richard of Sedbury, Richmondshire), knighted 30 June, 1599; died 31 Jan., 1640-1. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Sandie, Richard, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date circa 1581, aged 18; fellow 1581-90, B.A. 21 Jan., 1583-4, M.A. 28 June, 1586; rector of Great Linford, Bucks, 1589. See Ath. ii. 103; Boase, 48; & See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Fountaine, Stephen, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date circa 1581, aged 19; fellow 1578-88, B.A. 22 Nov., 1581, M.A. 4 June, 1584, rector of St. Peter Tavy, Devon, 1587; perhaps brother of John 1568. See Boase, 47.

Gill, Nicholas (Gyll), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 17; fellow 1584-95, B.A. 8 April, 1587, M.A. 29 Oct., 1589, vicar of Brent, Devon, 1600; father of Francis 1634. See Boase, 48; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Browning, Thomas (Brunninge), of Wilts, arm. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date circa 1581 (? 20 Dec., 1577), aged 23; fellow 1578-84, B.A. 27 Jan., 1581-2, licenced to practice medicine 16 April, 1602. See Boase, 47.

Duck, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric.-entry under date cicra 1581, aged 20; (20 Dec., 1577, see Boase), fellow 1579-84, B.A. 23 March, 1582-3, rector of St. Mabyn, Cornwall, 1584, died 1629. See Boase, 48.

Woolcombe, Thomas (Wollocombe), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 18, B.A. 21 June, 1585; perhaps student of Middle Temple 1595, as 2s. John, of Combe, Devon, esq. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Elforde, Hugh, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 20; a student of the Middle Temple 1582, as 3s. of John, of Shittster or Sheepstor, Devon, gent. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Bampfild, Richard, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 15; a student of the Middle Temple 1583, as 2nd son of Richard, of Poltimore, Devon, esq. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Payne, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 20 Nov., 1581, aged 14; B.A. 21 June, 1585, M.A. 5 July, 1588, rector of Plymptree, Devon, 1592. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Waye, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 19, B.A. 21 June, 1585, M.A. 9 July, 1589; rector of Iddisleigh, Devon, 1587. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Poope, George, of Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 16; bar.-at-law. Inner Temple, 1590, as of Menston, Dorset. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Mavericke, Radford, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 20; rector of Trusham, 1586, and vicar of Ilsington, Devon, 1597. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Steward, John, of Northants, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 18; of London (s. John, of Pateshull); baptised 26 Sept., 1562, died s.p. 1633.
Parker, Peter, of Somerset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 20; perhaps rector of Ruan Lanyhorne, Cornwall, 1591. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Fowler, Richard, of Beds, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1586. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Osberne, Richard, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 17; rector of Poltimore, Devon, 1597. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Tutt, Chiddiock, of Hants, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date circa 1581, aged 15; son of Henry, of West Meon, Hants.
(Huishe?), William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date circa 1581, aged 20. See O.H.S. xi. 99n.
Benfeild, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 19 (called Bentleye in Mat. Reg.).
Smithe, Thomas, of Bucks. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Nov., 1581, aged 20, "serviens," B.A. 7 Feb., 1582-3.
Reynold, Gilbert (Rainold), of co. Worcester. pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 16.
Steere, Bartholomew (Styere), of Somerset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 17.
Way, John, of Devon, pauper. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 19, B.A. 22 June, 1585.
Wolton, Matthew, of Devon, Episcopi fil. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 23 Dec., 1581, aged 10.
Alforde, Walter, of co. Worcester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1581-2, aged 18.
Heywood, John, of Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry under date circa 1581, aged 20.
Cookes, Edward, of co. Worcester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 19.
Geaste, George, of co. Worcester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 18.
Perberye, Thomas, of Northants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Nov., 1581, aged 22.
Juell, Thomas, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 16.
Sherman, Richard, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1581, aged 17.
Caylie, William, of Kent, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Nov., 1581, aged 28.
Snell, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1581-2, aged 21.
Tafte, Robert, of London, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 Nov., 1581, aged 19.
Hooper, Peter, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1581, aged 19.
Maton, Edward, of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Dec., 1581, aged 19.

Chichester, Arthur (Chechester), of Devon, militis fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 March, 1582-3, aged 19; created Lord Chichester of Belfast 23 Feb., 1612-13 (2nd son of John, of Rawleigh in Pilton, Devon), was captain of one of the ships against the 'Armada' in 1588, governor of Carrickfergus 1600, P.C. 1603, lord deputy 1604-15, lord high treasurer 1616, P.C. England 1622, died 19 Feb., 1624-5, brother of Adrian. See Foster's Peerage & D.N.B.

Giles, (Sir) Edward, of Devon. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1582-3, aged 17 (as arm.); student of Middle Temple 1584 (as son and heir of John, of Bowden, Devon); of Bowden, baptised at Totnes 21 July, 1566; knighted 23 July, 1603; M. P. Totnes 1597-8, Devon 1614, Totnes 1621-2, 1624-5, and 1628-9; buried 28 Dec., 1637, at Dean Prior. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Dennis, Thomas, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 Oct., 1582, aged 18; B.A. 6 July, 1586, fellow 1586-1601, M.A. 28 June, 1589, B.D. 10 July, 1600 (son of Thomas Denys, of Creed, in Cornwall), vicar of Menhenniot, Cornwall, 1600, until his death in 1637, father of Thomas 1622. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 49.

Chichester, John (Chechester), of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 June, 1582, aged 16; of the Inner Temple 1583 (as of Bishops Tawton, Devon, gent.), of Hall, son of John, of the same place, baptized 17 March, 1566-7, died 7 Feb., 1608, aged 42, father of the next named. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Sayer, William (Saeier), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 March, 1582-3, aged 24, B.A. 10 Nov., 1586, M.A. 7 July, 1598, then in orders; perhaps rector of Radnage, Bucks, 1589, and vicar of St. Clether, Cornwall, 1617. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Hyett, Robert (Hyatt), of Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 Feb., 1582-3, aged 31; one of these names vicar of Overton, Hants, 1591, rector of Colne Dennis, co. Gloucester, 1597. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bearcrofte, Thomas (Barcrofte), of co. Worcester, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 March, 1582-3, aged 15; a student of the Inner Temple, 1586, as of Amberley, co. Worcester. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Hardyng, Henry, of Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1582-3, aged 15 (as Hurdynge); student of Inner Temple 1586, as of Long Bredy, Dorset. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Chichester, Adrian (Chechester), of Devon, militis fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 March, 1582-3, aged 20; (7th son of Sir John, of Youlston, knight) brother of Arthur same date.
Wythe, Robert, of co. Worcester, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 March, 1582-3, aged 15; student of Inner Temple 1586, as of Droitwich, gent. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Earle, Richard, of Devon, cler. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 Aug., 1582, aged 15; B.A. 16 Feb., 1587-8, vicar of Moorwinstowe, Cornwall 1594. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Kettle, Edmund, of co. Worcester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 March, 1582-3, aged 17; perhaps rector of Churchill, co. Worcester, 1618. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Tyracke, Henry, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1582-3, aged 18, B.A. 21 Feb., 1586-7; vicar of Crowan, Cornwall, 1595. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Chaunt, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 March, 1582-3, aged 18; perhaps vicar of Kenton, Devon, 1605. See Foster's Index Ecclesisaticus.
Merser, Richard, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1582-96, proctor 1584, B.A. 14 July, 1585, M.A. 11 July, 1588, B.C.L. sup. 24 May, 1595. See Boase, 48.
Salter, Christopher, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 Sept., 1582, aged 21; said to have been incorporated as M.A. at Cambridge in 1612.
Dottin, John (Dottyn), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1582-3, aged 18; fellow 1584, died 1586. See Boase, 49.
Wichehalse, Nicholas (Wichehalls), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 July, 1582, aged 14.
Hurdynge, Henry, of Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1582-3, aged 15. See Hardinge.
Rouse, John (Rowse), of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 May, 1582, aged 19.
Carter, William, of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Feb., 1582-3, aged 15.
Peliton, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1582, aged 19.

Hele, Narcissus (Heale), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 Dec., 1583, aged 16; B.A. 21 Feb., 1586-7, M.A. 4 Feb., 1590-1, fellow 1593-7, B.D. 10 July, 1600, vicar of St. Keverne, Cornwall, 1598, rector of Bishop's Teignton 1604-10, of South Poole 1605, and of Ideford, Devon, 1610; father of Sampson 1622. See Boase, 50; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Farington, Esaiah (Farringdon), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 18; B.A. 21 Feb., 1586-7, fellow 1590-1604, M.A. 18 May, 1591, B.D. 6 May, 1602, rector of Lympstone 1603, vicar of Otterton, Devon, 1621-5; died in 1630. See Boase, 50; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Bosysto, Raffe, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 19; B.A. 21 Feb., 1586-7, fellow 1587-96, M.A. 29 Oct., 1589, vicar of St. Constantine, Cornwall, 1598, buried 23 Oct., 1601. See Boase, 49.

Giffard, George, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 17, probably of Tiverton, Devon (son and heir of Roger, of Tiverton Castle); baptised at Braunton 27 Sept., 1564; died 26 June, 1622.
Wolcot, Hugh (Woollcote), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1586, as 2s. Peter, of Meareston, Devon. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Mercer, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 13; fellow 1586-1601, B.A. 29 Oct., 1589, M.A. 23 June, 1592. See Boase, 49.
Tracy, Thomas, of co. Gloucester, eq. aur. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 Feb., 1583-4, aged 16, 2nd son of Sir John, of Tuddington, and died in London.
Goldesbrough, William (Gouldesbury), of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 July, 1583, aged 14, only in Mat. Reg., and there erased, non subs.
Bigges, Raphe (Bygges), of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 June, 1583, aged 19; B.A. 21 Feb., 1586-7, M.A. 29 Oct., 1589.
Coswarth, William, of Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 July, 1583, aged 17. See Vivian's Visitations of Cornwall.
Forward, Nicholas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 March, 1583-4, aged 20; B.A. 21 Feb., 1586-7.
Lilley, Nicholas (Lylley), of co. Worcester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 14.
Smithe, William (Smythe), of co. Worcester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 18.
Lillie, Emanuel, of co. Gloucester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 14.
Rose, Robert, of co. Gloucester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 15.
Holman, Raffe, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 Feb., 1583-4, aged 17.
Wellington, Peter, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 Dec., 1583, aged 20.
Stafford, John, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 March, 1583-4, aged 21.
Owen, William, of Oxon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 Jan., 1583-4, aged 25.
Rider, William, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1583, aged 16.

Osberne, William, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1584, aged 19; B.A. 11 July, 1588, M.A. 18 May, 1591, proctor 1599; fellow of All Souls' Coll., B.D. 1 July, 1606, D.D. 6 July, 1609, prebendary of Penell in collegiate church of Chumleigh, Devon, 1601, rector of Calstock, Cornwall, 1608, canon of Sarum 1613, and of Exeter 1615, vicar of Bampton, 2nd portion, Oxon, 1617. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Ducke, Nicholas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 July, 1584, aged 14; (son of Richard, of Heavitree) bar.-at-law, Lincoln's Inn, 1598, bencher 1614, treasurer 1628, died during his year of office, recorder of Exeter 1618, and M.P. 1624-5 & 1625, died 28 Aug., 1628, buried in Exeter Cathedral, brother of Arthur and father of Richard 1620. See Foster's Judges and Barristers & D.N.B.

Debancke, Robert (Debanke), of Oxon, 'cler. fil.' Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 16; B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 19 Feb., 1595-6, rector of Willoughby Waterless, co. Leicester, 1601, died vicar of Minster Lovell, Oxon, in 1611. See Edward 1594; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Carew, George, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 14; B.A. 9 July, 1590, perhaps a master in Chancery 1599-1612, of the M. T., Ath. Ox., iii. 449, but one of these names rector of Bickleigh, Devon, 1602. See Thomas same date. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Evelegh, James, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 16; fellow 1587-1601, B.A. 9 July, 1590, M.A. 10 May, 1593, perhaps 7s. of John, of Holcombe, and a knight. See Boase, 49.
Dudeney, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 May, 1584, aged 19; of the Middle Temple 1585, as son and heir of William, of Doddiscombsleigh, Devon. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Isaac, William (Isake), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 July, 1584, aged 18; perhaps 2nd son of John, of Heavitree, who was living at the herald's visitation, 1620, aged 86.
Wills, John, fellow Exeter Coll. 1584, B.A. 4 Dec., 1587, M.A. 13 April, 1592; one of these names rector of St. Mary Bothaw, London, 1601. See Boase, 49; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Carew, Thomas, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 17; one of these names rector of Bildeston, Suffolk, 1590. See George same date & Ath., i. 758.
Will(o)ughbe, John, of Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 20, B.A. 8 Feb., 1588-9, M.A. from Broadgates Hall, sup. 30 June, 1593. See Ath. i. 744.
Wo(o)lcomb, Robert, of Devon, cler. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 Oct., 1584, aged 16, B.A. 8 Feb., 1588-9; vicar of Chudleigh, Devon, 1600. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Periam, Edward, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 Feb., 1584-5, aged 16; B.A. 23 April, 1589, rector of Rowington, Somerset, 1594. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Birdall, Edward, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 18; vicar of Abbots Kerswell, Devon, 1591. See Foster's Index Ecc.
Cole, Thomas, fellow of Exeter Coll. 1584-95, B.A. 13 Feb., 1583-4, M.A. 26 June, 1587. See Boase, 49; & O.H.S., xii. 119.
Matlocke, Richard, of Northants, "gen. cond." Exeter Coll., matric. 3 April, 1584, aged 21; B.A. 29 Jan., 1587-8.
Reynoldes, Humphrey (Raynoldes), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 21.
Downe, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Feb., 1584-5, aged 16. See next entry.
Harvey, Jerome, of Somerset, mercatoris fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1584, aged 20.

Drake, Robert, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1585, aged 19; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1598, as of Littleham, Devon, sometime of Lyons' Inn, gent. (probably 3rd son of Gilbert, of Pratshead, in Littleham), of Daldich, died 30 Sept., and buried 10 Oct., 1628, in Littleham chancel. See Vivian's Devon Visitations & Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Bagwell, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 July, 1585, aged 18; 'fourteen years in theology,' B.D. 26 June 1605, and licence to preach 28th, vicar of Ewny-juxta-Lanant and St. Ives, Cornwall, 1596, and of Tregony 1601, rector of Stoke Climsland 1613, and of Stoke Goldington, Bucks, 1613. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Weare, Humphrey, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1585, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1597, bencher 1612 (as of Halberton, Devon, late of Lyons Inn, gent.), recorder of Tiverton 1620; perhaps M.P. Callington 1614, and Tiverton 1624-5, as Were; died 1625. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Amerideth, Lewis, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1585, aged 14; 2nd son of Edward, of Slapton, Devon, admitted to the Middle Temple 1587, baptized at Crediton 18 Dec., 1568, buried at St. Andrew's, Plymouth, 20 April, 1624. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Fairclough, Hugh (Fayerclough), of London, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1585, aged 14; B.A. from St. John's Coll. 19 April, 1589; M.A. from Exeter Coll. 27 June, 1592, vicar of Montacute, Somerset, 1618. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Ridgway, Nicholas (Rudgwaye), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 2 July, 1585, aged 12; B.A. 4 Feb., 1590-1, rector of Burton Bradstock, Dorset, 1599, father of the next. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Kelly, Anthony, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 March, 1585-6, aged 17; B.A. 29 Oct., 1589, M.A. 23 June, 1592, rector of North Bovey, Devon, 1591. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Wight, John (Wyght), of Middlesex, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1585, aged 17; B.A. from Christ Church 21 March, 1588-9, M.A. 24 April, 1592, B.D. 17 Dec., 1601.
Stavelie, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 March, 1585-6, aged 22; perhaps rector of West Buckland, Devon, 1593. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Whetcomb, William, from Exeter Coll. 13 Feb., 1583-4, fellow Oriel Coll. 1585, M.A. 5 May, 1589; will at Oxford proved 29 Sept., 1611.
Symes, William, of Somerset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 15 Oct., 1585, aged 14; perhaps brother of Henry, and John 1588.
Griffith, Robert (Gruffin), of co. Carnarvon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1585, aged 12.
Bishop, John (Bysshoppe), of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1585, aged 20.
Osborne, John (Osburne), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 June, 1585, aged 15.
Turner, Humfrey, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 29 Oct., 1585, aged 10.
Catforde, Robert, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 21 Jan., 1585-6, aged 16.
Lippencott, John, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1585, aged 20.
Billet, Arthur, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 July, 1585, aged 18.
Robinson, Edward, of Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 21 Jan., 1585-6, aged 16.
Gregorye, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1585, aged 14.
Compton, James, of Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 June, 1585, aged 17.
Barfelde, John, of London, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1585, aged 12.
Hodge, John, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 June, 1585, aged 16.
Leggatt, John, of Essex, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1585, aged 16.

Lower, (Sir) William, of Cornwall, gen. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 June, 1586, aged 16; of Treventy, co. Carmarthen, astronomer; student of Middle Temple 1589 (as son and heir of Thomas, of Winnow, Cornwall, esq.); knighted at Theobalds 11 May, 1603; M.P. Bodmin 1601, Lostwithiel 1604-11; died 12 April, 1615; brother of Alexander and Nicholas; father of Thomas 1643. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg., etc.

Wade, Edward, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 21 Oct., 1586, aged 14; B.A. 29 May, 1590, M.A. 20 May, 1595; rector of Holdenby 1597-1635, vicar of Wellingborough 1603-7, and rector of Church Brampton, (all) Northants, 1603, until his death, buried there 13 Nov., 1635; father of the next-named. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Awbrye, Oliver, of Middlesex, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 Feb., 1586-7, aged 25; B.A. from Hart Hall 17 Feb., 1586-7, rector of East Donyland, Essex, 1590 (Newcourt), of Cliddesden, and of Farley Chamberlaine, Hants, 1599, father of Walter 1628. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Bearde, Nathaniel, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Oct., 1586, aged 17; B.A. 9 July, 1590, M.A. 10 May, 1593, vicar of Alternon, Cornwall, 1600-41, father of Thomas 1636. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Courteney, John, of Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 May, 1586, aged 18; of Middle Temple 1590 (as son and heir of Peter, of Trethurfe, Cornwall), died 8 July, 1615. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Richardes, Richard, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Nov. 1586, aged 19, B.A. 9 July, 1590, M.A. 19 June, 1593, rector of Combemartin 1595, and of Kentisbury, Devon, 1598. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Southcott, Richard, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 21 Oct., 1586, aged 15, student of Inner Temple 1589, as of Shillingford, Devon, gen., perhaps M.P. Plympton 1593. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Ridgwaye, Richard, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Nov., 1586, aged 16; student of Middle Temple 1589, as of Tor Mohun, Devon, esq.; brother of George, etc. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Hockin, George, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 July, 1586, aged 16; fellow 1588-1602, B.A. 9 July, 1591, M.A. 6 May, 1594, B.D. 20 April, 1602. See Boase, 49.
Ridgwaye, George (Rydgwaye), of Devon gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Nov., 1586, aged 17; brother of John and Thomas 1581, of Richard 1580, and of Southcott.
Symons, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Jan., 1586-7, aged 17, B.A. 17 Dec., 1590.
Skinner, George (Skynner), of Norfolk, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 April, 1586, aged 16.
Waring, William (Weringe), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 June, 1586, aged 22.
Dynham, James (Dinham), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Jan., 1586-7, aged 18.
Sewarde, Samuel, of Dorset, "cond. gen." Exeter Coll., matric. 16 Dec., 1586, aged 17.
Knapton, "Albinus," of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 July, 1586, aged 18.
Stoforde, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 Oct., 1586, aged 17.
Dell, Richard, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 June, 1586, aged 16.
Osborne, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 June, 1586, aged 16.
Hill, William, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 July, 1586, aged 20.

Barcham, John (Barcombe), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 Dec., 1587, aged 15; scholar Corpus Christi Coll. 1588, B.A. 5 Feb., 1590-1, M.A. 12 Dec., 1594, fellow 1596, B.D. 7 July, 1603, D.D. 14 March, 1615-16, incorporated at Cambridge 1622 (as Barkham), eldest son Laurence Barcham, of St. Leonards, Devon, chaplain to Dr. Bancroft and Dr. Abbot, Archbishops of Canterbury, rector and dean of Bocking, canon of St. Paul's 1610, until his death 25 March, 1642, buried in the chancel, author of the 'Display of Heraldry' (Guillim's Heraldry), father of George Barkham, of St. John's 1635. See p.; Ath., iii. 35; & D.N.B.

Wilshman, Walter, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 Nov., 1587, aged 15, B.A. 9 July, 1591; M.A. from Broadgates Hall 3 July, 1594, vicar of Tounstal with St. Saviour's, Dartmouth, Devon, 1606, until his death 21 May, 1636, buried 26th in his church; father of the next. See Ath. ii. 601; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Symes, John, of Somerset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 23 Feb., 1587-8, aged 14, B.A. 9 July, 1591; of Poundsford, Somerset (son of William), student of Lincoln's Inn 1589, M.P. Somerset 1624-5; died 21 Oct., 1661, aged 88; perhaps brother of William 1585, and Henry 1588. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Lenne, Andrew, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1587, aged 17; B.A. 9 July, 1591; M.A. from St. Edmund Hall 7 Dec., 1597; vicar of Cricklade St. Sampson, Wilts, 1600-41; father of the next. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Symes, Henry (Simes), of Somerset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 23 Feb., 1587-8, aged 13, B.A. 9 July, 1591 (as Syms); student of Lincoln's Inn 1591; brother of John 1588, and William 1585. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Luscombe, Henry, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1587, aged 19; B.A. 9 July, 1591, M.A. 15 May, 1594, rector of Thurleston, Devon, 1597. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Vennynge, Steven, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1587, aged 19; one of these names rector of St. Lawrence in Southampton 1615. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Griffith, Rowland (Gryffithe), of co. Carnarvon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 Dec., 1587, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1594. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Sherw(o)od, John (alias Sherie), of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 July, 1587, aged 17, B.A. 17 May, 1591; M.A. from Broadgates Hall 17 June, 1594.
Dottin, Giles (Dottyn), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1587, aged 19.
Singleton, Thomas, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1587, aged 18.
Carpenter, John, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 July, 1587, aged 17.
Baker, Robert, of Somerset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1587, aged 18.
Lowman, Francis, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 July, 1587, aged 18.
Amadas, John, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 Dec., 1587, aged 16.

Lapworth, Edward, of co. Warwick, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 Jan., 1588-9, aged 14; pensioner of Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge, 1590, and was elected scholar; B.A. from St. Alban Hall 25 Oct., 1592, M.A. 30 June, 1595, master of Magdalen College school 1598-1610, licenced to practice medicine from Magdalen Coll. 3 June. 1605, B. and D.Med. 20 June, 1611, Lynacre physic lecturer 1619, Sedleian professor of natural philosophy 1621, until his death at Bath 24 May, 1636. See Bloxam, iii. 138.

Petre, William, of Essex, equitis fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 July, 1588, aged 15; B.A. 4 Feb., 1590-1, student of Middle Temple 1593 (as son and heir of John, of Ingarstone, Essex, kt.), 2nd Lord Petre, M.P. Essex 1597-8; died 5 May, 1637; father of Robert, and of William next-named. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Ford, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1588, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1600, treasurer 1627 (as son and heir of John, late of Ashburton, Devon, gen., deceased), baptised at Ilsington 21 April, 1567; buried at Ashburton 31 Dec., 1635. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Spo(u)re, Richard, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 May, 1588, aged 18; of Trebartha, parish of Northill, Cornwall (s. Henry), student of Middle Temple 1588; buried at Northill 25 Jan., 1646, aged 76, M.I. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Tanner, John, of Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 May, 1588, aged 18, B.A. 13 Nov., 1591, M.A. 5 July, 1595; rector of Offwell, Devon, 1597, and vicar of North Petherton, Somerset, 1598. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bowdon, George, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 April, 1588, aged 18; B.A. 9 Nov., 1591, rector of Mapperton, Dorset, 1599, father of the next and of John 1625. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Came, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 June, 1588, aged 18; B.A. 3 Feb., 1591-2, fellow 1592-1606, M.A. 12 Nov., 1594. See Boase, 50.
Dolphin, James, of Somerset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 March, 1588, aged 17; B.A. (sup. 1 Feb.) 1591-2. See O.H.S., xii. 173.
Clarke, Roger, of Salop, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 June, 1588, aged 15; B.A. 3 Feb., 1591-2.
Scott, William, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 March, 1588, aged 21.
Rider, Edward, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 March, 1588, aged 20.

Tryst, Thomas, of Northants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 25 Oct., 1589, aged 14; of Culworth, Northants, bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1602, treasurer 1628 (as 2s. William, of Maidford, Northants, gent., deceased); died 7 April, 1630, buried at Culworth; brother of Richard and William 1589. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Haydon, Peter, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 May, 1589, aged 17; of Netherbury, Dorset, bar.-at-law, of Lincoln's Inn, 1598, as Heydon (2s. Thomas, of Bowood, and Epforde, Devon), died 1627. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Whiddon, John, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 May, 1589, aged 18; student of Inner Temple 1591 (as s. Edward, of Chagford, Devon, gent.), and perhaps knighted 23 July, 1603. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Haycroft, John, of Devon, cler. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 June, 1589, aged 22; B.A. 31 Oct., 1592 (as Thomas), vicar of Abbots Kerswell, Devon, 1610. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Tryst, Richard, of Northants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Oct., 1589, aged 18; of Maidford, Northants; eldest son of William, and brother of Thomas and William 1589.
Whiddon, Oliver, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1589, aged 15; perhaps student of Lincoln's Inn 1602. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Tryst, William, of Northants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 25 Oct., 1589, aged 12; of Culworth, Northants; brother of the last-named.
Symons, Richard (Simons), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 May, 1589, aged 16, B.A. 9 March, 1592-3, M.A. 25 May, 1596.
Rolle, John, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 May, 1589, aged 15; B.A. 8 Feb., 1592-3, M.A. 25 May, 1596.
Williams, Edward (Wylliams), of Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 May, 1589, aged 16, B.A. 23 Feb., 1592-3.
Broade, John (Brode), of co. Worcester, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Oct., 1589, aged 18.
Cover, Richard (Covor), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Oct., 1589, aged 18.
Asquith, George, of London, pleb, Exeter Coll., matric. 31 Oct., 1589, aged 14.
Challis, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 Oct., 1589, aged 14.
Tucker, Hugh, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 Oct., 1589, aged 21.
Ducke, Richard, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 May, 1589, aged 18.

Hyde, (Sir) Nicholas (Huyde), of Wilts. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 May, 1590, aged 18 (as arm.); bar-at-law., Middle Temple, 1598, treasurer 1626 (y.s. Laurence, of West Hatch, Wilts), recorder of Bristol, M.P. Andover 1601, Christchurch 1604-11, Bath 1614, Bristol 1626, serjeant-at-law 21, and knighted 28 Jan., 1626-7, chief justice king's bench 5 Feb., 1626-7, until his death 25 Aug., 1631; brother of Laurence 1579, and of Henry 1579. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary & D.N.B.

Brooke, (Sir) Basill, of Salop, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1590, aged 14; 'Royalist,' admitted a student of the Middle Temple 1594 (as son and heir of John, of Madeley, Salop, esq., who was also son and heir of Robert B., knight, late chief justice Common Pleas), knighted at Highgate 1 May, 1604, (query M.P. co. Leicester, 1607-11), committed to the Tower in 1644. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Hayman, Robert, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1590, aged 11, B.A. 8 July, 1596; in his supplicate, he says, he is going abroad; student of Lincoln's Inn 16 Oct., 1596, governor of the plantation of Harbour Grace, in Bristol Hope, in Britaniola, anciently called Newfoundland; admon. granted 24 Jan., 1632-3. See Ath. ii. 545; Foster's Inns of Court Reg.; & D.N.B.

Petre, (Sir) George, of Devon, arm. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 May, 1590, aged 15, B.A. 31 Oct., 1592; M.A. from Magdalen Coll. 26 June, 1598, student of Inner Temple 1594, as of Tor Bryan, Devon, gen. (s. William), knighted 23 July, 1603. brother of William 1599. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Elly, John, of co. Worcester, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 June, 1590, aged 17; B.A. 5 July, 1594, M.A. 14 July, 1598, then "literis incumbens" in the household of the bishop of Worcester, perhaps rector of Beaudesert, co. Warwick, 1606-36; father of John 1630. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Collins, Edward (Collens), of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1590, aged 19; B.A. from Hart Hall 20 April, 1594, rector of Illogan, Cornwall, 1600, father of John 1627, and one Richard Collin, compounded for this rectory 26 June, 1559. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Bluet, Arthur, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1590-1, aged 15; student of Gray's Inn 1593, as son and heir of Richard, of Holcombe Rogus, Devon, died 12 Nov., 1612, father of Francis and of John, 1619, and brother of Roger. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Calmadye, John, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 May, 1590, aged 15 (or 18); of Saltash, admitted to the Middle Temple 1594 (as 3rd son of Vincent, of Wembury, Devon, deceased), died in 1632, brother of the last named. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Tresilian, Richard, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Nov., 1590, aged 18; student of Middle Temple 1594, as son and heir of John, of Newlyn, Cornwall, esq., deceased. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Harvie, George, of Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1590, aged 16; student of Middle Temple 1594 (as son and heir of Vigors, of Marham Church, Cornwall, gent. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Paynter, William, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Nov., 1590, aged 24; student of Middle Temple 1591, as son and heir of George, of Trelissick, Cornwall, gent. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Smithe, Nicholas, of Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Nov., 1590, aged 15, B.A. 20 June, 1594; student of Lincoln's Inn 1595, and perhaps knighted 23 July, 1603. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Polkinhorne, John, of Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Nov., 1590, aged 17; of Polkinhorne, Cornwall (s. Thomas); baptised at Gwinear 11 Nov., 1573; died 13 Oct., 1638.
Rowe, John, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll. matric. 27 Nov., 1590, aged 16; B.A. from Magdalen Hall 3 July, 1594, rector of Cambourne, Cornwall, 1617. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Masters, Thomas, of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 May, 1590, aged 19; vicar of Ewnywith-St.-Ives, Cornwall, 1601. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
