Stratford, John, s. J(ohn), of Atherston Grange, co. Warwick, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 May, 1680, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1686, and bencher 1712; brother of Theodore 1678. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Chichester, Henry, s. John, of Youlston, Devon, baronet, Exeter Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1680-1, aged 18; of Sherwill, admitted to the Inner Temple 1682, buried 9 June, 1694, at Bishops Tawton. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Swe(e)te, John, s. J., of St. Keverne, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 26 March, 1680, aged 13; student of Inner Temple 1683, as son and heir of John, of Trayne, Devon, cler. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Wo(o)lcom, Robert, s. J., of Whitestone, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 16, B.A. 18 March, 1683-4, M.A. 1687; rector of Whitestone 1709. See Rawl. v. 492; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Hore, Charles, s. John, of Chagford, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 May, 1680, aged 17; a student of the Inner Temple 1680; buried at Chagford 8 June, 1720. See Foster's Inns of Court Register.
Davie, (Sir) William, s. William, of Creedy, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 March, 1680, aged 17; 4th baronet, baptized 1 July, 1662, buried at Sandford 24 March, 1706-7.
Masters, Charles, s. Tho., of Tattenhill, co. Stafford, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 April, 1680, aged 17; B.A. 1685, fellow 1682, until his death in 1686. See Boase, 80.
Bruton, Thomas, s. William, of Alington, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 17; brother of the last named and of William 1674.
Haydon, Edward, (subs. "Ed.," more like "Tho.," probably "John"), s. Ralph, of Farway, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 March, 1680-1, aged 18.
Mullens, George, s. G., of Bradford, Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 April, 1680, aged 74; B.A. 1683, M.A. 1686, B. and D.Med. 1711.
Dynham, John, (Dinham), s. John, of Blisland, Cornwall, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 March, 1680-1, aged 17; B.A. 1684, M.A. 1687.
Nicholls, Matthew, of Andover, Hants, cler. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 July, 1680, aged 17; B.A. from St. Alban Hall 1684.
Dolling, Willoughby, s. Michael, of Doddiscombsleigh, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 21 Feb., 1680-1, aged 18.
Westcott, Hugh, s. Ge., of "Berrynarbor," Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 16, B.A. 1683.
Sampson, Thomas, s. Ric., of Grylls, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 March, 1680, aged 17, B.A. 1683.
Haydon, John, s. J., of Egloskerry, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 July, 1680, aged 16; B.A. 1684.
Lyndon, Stephen (Lindon), s. Jo., of West Alvington, Devon, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 May, 1680, aged 18.
Bownde, Samson (Bound), s. S., of Ashborne, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 21 Feb., 1680-1, aged 17.
Thompson, Daniel, s. D., of Wootton Rivers, Wilts, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 March, 1680-1, aged 17.
Banks, John, s. William, of 'All Cannings,' Wilts, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 April, 1680, aged 16.
Leigh, Robert, s. J., of Exeter, Devon, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 16; B.A. 1683.
Clifford, James, s. James, of Weare, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 July, 1680, aged 17.
Lewis, Jacob, s. James, of Exeter, Devon, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 March, 1680, aged 18.
Crossman, John (Crosman), s. And., pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 July, 1680, aged 17.
Preston, Richard, s. Tho., cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1680, aged 17.

Colchester, Maynard, 1s. Duncomb, of Westbury, co. Gloucester, equitis. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 July, 1681, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1689 (his father knighted at Whitehall 9 Nov., 1674), M. P. co. Gloucester 1701-8, died 25 June, 1715. See Foster's Judges and Barristers. [Addenda: licenced (v.g.) 14 Jan., 1689-90, to marry Sarah Clark, of St. Vedast, alias Foster's, London.]

Peyton, Craven, 1s. Rob., of London, equitis. Exeter Coll. matric. 13 May, 1681, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1680; M.P. Boroughbridge 1705-13, died 25 Dec., 1738; his father, of East Barnet (s. Henry), knighted 12 Aug., 1670; M.P. Middlesex 1678, until expelled 14 Dec., 1680. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Waldo, Edward, s. Dan., of Harrow, Middlesex, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 Sept., 1681, aged 17; of Harrow-on-the-Hill, bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1690; licenced 10 June, 1691, to marry Mary, daughter of William Pellatt, of Mitcham, Surrey. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Borlase, Nicholas, s. Humphr., of Treluddro, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 Sept., 1681, aged 16; student of Middle Temple 1683, buried in the Temple Church 23 June, 1685. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Sagittary, John, s. Fred., of Blandford, Dorset, D.Med. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1681, aged 15, scholar of Wadham Coll. 1683, B.A. 1685, M.A. 1687, fellow 1690, B.Med. 1690, D.Med. 1693. See Gardiner, 330.

Jago, John, s. Robert, of Helston, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 July, 1681, aged 16; B.A. from New Inn Hall 21 Feb., 1686-7, vicar of Wendron, Cornwall, 1692. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Pearce, Thomas, s. William, of Penzance, Cornwall, pauper. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 July, 1681, aged 18; B.A. 1685, vicar of Talland 1692, and rector of Broadoake, Cornwall, 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Venning, Edmund, s. Nic., of Lamerton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 July, 1681, aged 18; LL.B. from Trinity Hall, Cambridge, 1693; rector of Trevalga, Cornwall, 1702. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Sherard, Christopher, born at Stapleford, co. Leicester, s. Bennet, Baron of Leitrim, in Ireland, Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Nov., 1681, aged 15; died 19 Feb. following. See Ath. i. p. xciv.
Willcox, John, s. J., of East Ogwell, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Nov., 1681, aged 16, B.A. 1685, M.A. 1688; perhaps vicar of Beenham, Berks, 1687.
Colmer, James, s. Hugh, of Truro, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 May, 1681, aged 16; B.A. 1686, M.A. 1689, B.Med. 1690.
Bury, Arthur, s. A(rthur), of Puckington, Somerset, s.t.d. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Nov., 1681, aged 16; brother of John 1668.
Maynard, Robert, s. H., of Westbury, co. Gloucester, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Nov., 1681, aged 19, B.A. 13 Feb., 1685-6.
Squire, William, s. Christopher, of South Molton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 July, 1681, aged 17.
Atkey, Thomas, s. Th., of Ilfracombe, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 Dec., 1681, aged 17; B.A. 1685.
Parminter, Henry, s. William, of Ilfracombe, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 July, 1681, aged 15.
Verman, John, s. John, of De la Morran, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 Sept., 1681, aged 16.
Neyle, William, s. William, of Ippleston, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Nov., 1681, aged 17.
Bond, Augustine, s. A., of Tavistock, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 May, 1681, aged 19.

Crabb, John, s. William, of Child-Okeford, Dorset, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1682, aged 16; B.A. 1685, fellow 1687-94, M.A. 1688, minister of Breamore Chapel, Hants, 38 years chaplain to William, Duke of Manchester; licenced, 31 Oct., 1693, to marry Dorothy Waller, of Beaconsfield, Bucks, spinster; rector of Tarrant Hinton 1712-48, and vicar of Tarrant Monkton 1705-49, died in 1749. See Boase, 82; Rawlinson, i. 305; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Pendarves, Alexander, s. J(ohn), of Penryn, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 July, 1682, aged 17; of Roscrowe, Cornwall, student of Gray's Inn 1682, M.P. Penryn in 9 parliaments, 1689-98 (Jan.), 1699-1700, 1700-5, 1710—(March), 1714, Helston (April), 1714, Launceston (July), 1721, until his death 8 March, 1725; brother of John 1682, and of William 1678. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Drake, George, s. Ph(ilip), of Saltcomb, Devon, pleb. (paup. in Mat. Reg.). Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1682, aged 16; B.A. 1685, M.A. 1688, rector of Belstone, Devon, 1688, and of Sampford Peverell 1697, canon of Exeter 1707. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Vivian's Devon Visitations, 295, where his father and mother are said to marry in 1615.

Allyn, Richard, s. John, of Plymouth, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 15; scholar of Corpus Christi Coll., B.A. 1685, M.A. 13 March, 1688-9, B.D. 1697, chaplain of H.M. Customs 50 years, rector of Little Staughton, Beds, 1699, and of Malden 1704. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Rawlinson, xx. 23.

Vincent, Shadrach, s. Walter, of Truro, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 July, 1682, aged 17 B.A. 1686, M.A. 23 March, 1688-9; vicar of Pelynt, Cornwall, 1687, and rector of Bratton Clovelly, Devon, 1696; another of these names was M.P. Fowey 1689-95; brother of Henry 1667. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Maundrell, Henry, s. Rob., of Compton, Wilts, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 April, 1682, aged 16; B.A. 1685, fellow 1686-1701, M.A. 1688, B.D. (by decree) 28 June, 1697; chaplain to the factory at Aleppo, and famous for his travels, died there in 1701. See Hearne, ii. 60; Rawl. ii. 81; & Boase, 82.

Bingham, Richard, s. Stroud, of Henstridge, Somerset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 March, 1682-3, aged 15; of Melcomb Bingham (on the death of his uncle, Colonel John, M. P., aforesaid), M.P. Bridport 1702-5, Dorset April, 1711-13, died in 1735. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Cary, Edward, s. George, dean of Exeter. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 April, 1682, aged 16; B.A. 1685, rector of Silverton St. Mary, Devon, 1689, sub-dean of Exeter 1693, died 28 Dec., 1695, buried in St. Margaret's, Westminster, brother of William 1678. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Fulford, Francis, of Fulford, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 May, 1682, aged 15, of Fulford; colonel in the army; born 8 Oct., 1666, M.P. Callington 1690-5, 1698-1700; died s.p. 26 Sept., 1709 (? 7 Oct., 1700, aged 34), at Dunsford. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Pendarves, John, s. J., of Penryn, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 July, 1682, aged 16; B.A. 1686, M.A. 23 Jan., 1688-9, rector of Dittisham 1689, and of Drewsteignton, Devon, 1704-11; dead before 1727; brother of Alexander and of William 1678. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Pitt, John, s. William, of Pimperne, Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Oct., 1682, aged 18; B.A. 1686, vicar of Hilton 1689-1705, and of Sturminster Newton 1705-32, and rector of Wareham St. Michael's, Dorset, 1706-12; father of John 1711. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Kempe, Thomas, s. John, of Gerrans, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 16, B.A. 1685, M.A. 1688; one of these names LL.B. from Jesus Coll., Cambridge, 1703, beneficed in Somerset 1692-1708; brother of Henry 1672. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Torre, John, s. Henry, of Tavistock, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1682-3, aged 16, B.A. 1686; rector of St. John's, Cornwall, 1697-1743, vicar of St. Winnow 1724-8, and of St. Bruard, also Cornwall, 1727-8. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Cory, John, s. Sam., of Rattery, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1682-3, aged 17; perhaps rector of Aveton Gifford, Devon, 1690, and ? of Lisbourne in South Brent, father of Samuel 1712. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Mules, Walter, s. Geo., of West Down, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 16, B.A. 1685; vicar of Newlyn, Cornwall, 1691, of Bishops Nympton 1696, and rector of Newton Tracy, Devon, 1697. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Rich, Lionell, s. Tho., of Cheltenham, co. Gloucester, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 Oct., 1682, aged 17; student of Lincoln's Inn 1680 (his father of Dowdeswell); father of Thomas 1711. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Yonge, Chichester, s. Tho., of Plymouth, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 May, 1682, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1688; buried in Temple church 5 Aug., 1695. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Clark, Nicholas, s. Goodwyn, of Medhurst, Sussex, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 April, 1682, aged 19; B.A. 1685 (as Clarke), rector of Shafton St. James, Dorset, 1703. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Richardson, John, s. J., of Endellion, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 16, B.A. 1685, M.A. 1688; vicar of Morval, Cornwall, about 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.
White, Martine (Whight), s. Sam., of Exeter (city), gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 Dec., 1682, aged 18, B.A. 1686; vicar of Knowestone and Molland, Devon, 1692. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Hody, John, s. Hugh, of Woodycombe, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 May, 1682, aged 19; of Nethway, Devon; born 18 Feb., 1662-3; will dated 9 Sept., 1695, proved 31 Dec., 1698.
Vivian, Thomas, s. John, of St. Issey, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1682-3, aged 17, B.A. 1686, M.A. 1689, fellow 1688, resigned at Dublin 1700. See Boase, 82.
Seymer, Henry, s. Rob., of Handford, Dorset, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Oct., 1682, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1684; died in 1692. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Baker, Henry, s. H., of Midhurst, Sussex, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 Dec., 1682, aged 17; B.A. 1686, rector of Lynch, Sussex, 1699. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Goddard, Philip, s. Ph., of Beenham, Berks, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 15; B.A. 1685, vicar of Beenham, 1690. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Bogan, Zachary, s. William, of Little Hempston, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1682, aged 16; B.A. 1685, buried at Little Hempston 2 Nov., 1693.
Westbrook, Benjamin, s. John, of Harting, Sussex, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 April, 1682, aged 18; admon. at Oxford 12 March, 1686.
Blackmore, Edward (or Edmond), s. Hugh, of Bishops Nympton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 July, 1682, aged 17; B.A. 1686.
Thomson, William, s. William, of Freshford, Somerset, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 May, 1682, aged 16, B.A. 9 Feb., 1685-6.
Southcott, Fitzwilliam, s. F., of Powderham, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1682-3, aged 19, B.A. 1686.
Collins, John, s. William, of London, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 15; B.A. 1685, M.A. 1688.
Meaden, William, s. William, of Amesbury, Wilts, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Oct., 1682. aged 20; B.A. 1686.
Maddockes, John (Madox), s. J., of Kilmington, Somerset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 March, 1682-3, aged 17.
Bodley, Thomas, s. John, of Crediton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 16; B.A. 1685.
Avant, Thomas, s. Phil., of Salcomb Regis, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 14.
Trenchard, Henry, s. John, of Holnest, Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Feb., 1682-3, aged 17.
Erisey, John, s. William, of Bickley, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1682-3, aged 18.
Burdwood, Richard, s. R., of Alvington, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 Oct., 1682, aged 18.
Palmer, William, s. William, of King Stanton, Devon. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1682, aged 19.
Smale, Edward, s. E., of Wermington, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1682-3, aged 18.
Moore, John, s. Thomas, of Badcombe, Somerset, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Oct., 1682, aged 16.
Lord, Laurence, s. L., of Fritwell, Oxon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1682-3, aged 17.
Perkins, Marcus, s. M., of Sidbury, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1682, aged 18.
Northcote, John, s. J., of Crediton, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 July, 1682, aged 16.

West, Thomas, s. Rich, of Creaton, Northants, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 March, 1683-4, aged 16, B.A. 1687; fellow of Merton Coll. 1688, M.A. 1691, B.Med. 1693, D.Med. 1696; fellow college of physicians 1718, treasurer 1721-22; died in Red Lion Square 17 Aug., 1738, buried in Merton College chapel; brother of Edward 1697, and Richard 1689. See Rawl. vi. 268; & Munk's Roll, ii. 59.

Symes, John, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 March, 1683-4; student of Lincoln's Inn 1686 (as son and heir of Thomas, of Lincoln's Inn, esq., deceased, who was son and heir of Thomas, of Poundesford, Somerset, esq.); died 6 July, 1687, buried in his college chapel. See Gutch, i. 119; & Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Damer, Joseph, s. Edward, of Dorchester, Dorset, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 Nov., 1683, aged 17; B.A. 1687, his father rector of Wyke Regis, Dorset, and chaplain to the Jersey garrison, but deprived at the restoration. See Hutchins' Dorset, iv. 387.

Payne, Samuel (Paine), paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 May, 1683; B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 24 Jan., 1686-7; M.A. from Magdalen Hall 1692, rector of Bristol St. Leonard 1691, and of St. Michael's 1693; father of Robert 1709. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Edgcombe, John, s. John, of Plymouth, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 15; B.A. from Corpus Christi Coll. 1688, M.A. 1691, rector of West Leigh, Devon, 1695, and of Aveton Gifford, 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Byne, Francis, s. Edward, of Pyworthy, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 Dec., 1683, aged 18; B.A. 21 Jan., 1687-8, vicar of Linkinhorne, Cornwall, 1690, his father rector of Pyworthy 1661. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Carew, Richard, y.s. Thomas, of St. Thomas, Devon, eq. aur. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 19; of Barley, Devon, admitted to the Middle Temple 1684, his will proved 1686. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Moore, James, of Cheriton Fitzpaine, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 May, 1683; student of Lincoln's Inn 1683, as 3s. John, of Upcot, Devon, esq., deceased; brother of John 1678. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Lamerton, William, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 May, 1683; B.A. 22 March, 1687-8; M.A. from Caius Coll., Cambridge, 1712; vicar of Alveley, Essex, 1698, rector of Bedhampton, Hants, 1713. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Heinsius, Hopton, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 March, 1683-4 (called "Stephen Heynes" in Mat. Reg.), one Hopton Haynes, fellow Clare Hall, Cambridge, and M.A. 1722, beneficed in Suffolk. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Milman, Francis, s. Tho., of South Brent, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 17; B.A. from Oriel Coll. 1687, vicar of Paington, Devon, 1692, until his death in 1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Strickland, Walter, s. Tho., of Boynton, Yorks, bart. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 March, 1683-4, aged 18; student of Middle Temple 1684; buried at St. Mary's, Beverley, 1 Feb., 1730-1. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Hele, Francis, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 May, 1683, student of Middle Temple 1684, as son and heir of George, of Bradridge, Cornwall, esq., deoeased. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Wilkes, Francis, s. Robert, of Dointon, co. Gloucester, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 18, B.A. 1687; rector of Rowberrow, Somerset, 1691. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Wood, William, s. Edw., of Exeter (city), paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 March, 1683-4, aged 17, B.A. 1687; perhaps rector of Cleyhanger, Devon, 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Pridham, Edward, s. E., of Morchard Bishops, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 March, 1683, aged 15, B.A. 1687; M.A. from Queen's Coll., Cambridge, 1691.
Conant, John, 'cler. fil.' Exeter Coll., matric. 20 March, 1683-4; B.A. 1687, M.A. 1690, vicar of Moreden, Dorset, 1695. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Tallant, Antony, s. Humfr., of Plymouth, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 March, 1683-4, aged 16, B.A. from Hart Hall 22 March, 1687-8.
Smith, Edmund, s. Tho., of Caster, co. Lincoln, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 May, 1683, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall 10 March, 1686-7.
Drake, Francis, s. F., of Ide, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1683, aged 17; B.A. 1686, perhaps of the Bucks family.
Parr, Edward, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 March, 1683-4, B.A. 1687, rector of Cadleigh, Devon, 1692. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Williams, Richard, s. R., of Probus, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1683, aged 17; perhaps father of Balthazar.
Richmond, John, s. William, of Bath Easton, Somerset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1683, aged 19; B.A. 1686.
Hoskin, Nicholas, s. Rich., of Lamoran, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 March, 1683-4, aged 19, B.A. 1687.
Harris, William, s. William, of Cheriton Fitz Payne, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 3 Dec., 1683, aged 19.
Bishop, James, s. Henry, of Sudbury, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 March, 1683-4, aged 18; B.A. 1687.
Perrott, Thomas (Parratt), s. Nath., of Lyme, Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 May, 1683, aged 18.
Hake, Richard, s. Tho., of Walkhampton, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 18.
Donithorpe, James, s. Nic., of Gulvall, Cornwall, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 May, 1683, aged 17.
Bolithoe, William, s. William, of Exeter, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 16.
Spark, Angell, s. A., of Exeter (city), pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1683-4, aged 17.
Geere, John (Geare), s. John, of Exeter, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1683, aged 18.
Mill, John, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 June, 1683.

Westley, Samuel, s. John (1651), of Whitchurch, Dorset, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 Nov., 1684, aged 18, B.A. 1688 (as Wesley); M.A. from Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge, 1694; rector of South Ormesby 1691, and of Epworth 1695, and of Wroote, (all) co. Lincoln, 1722, until his death 25 April, 1735; father of Samuel next-named, and Charles and John; see page 1526, 2nd Series. See Ath. iv. 503; Rawl. ii. 71, iv. 83a, and xxi. 196; Hearne, i. 11, 51, 52; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Gannett, William, s. G. (?"Gul."), of Blandford, Dorset, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 July, 1684, aged 17; B.A. 1688, vicar of Cloford, Somerset, 1693, rector of Podimore-Milton 1707, and of Mells 1719, canon of Wells 1722. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Haydon, Gideon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 July, 1684; student of Middle Temple 1685 (as son and heir of Gideon, of Cadhay, Devon, esq.); baptised 26 July, 1666, buried at Ottery St. Mary 17 March, 1706-7. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Rumbelow, John, s. Nath., of Quethiocke, Cornwall, pleb. (subscribes "clerici"). Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1684-5, aged 16, B.A. 7 March, 1688-9, M.A. 1691; rector of East Portlemouth, Devon. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Bayly, Richard (Baily), s. Rob., of East Budley, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1684-5, aged 16; B.A. 1688, M.A. 1691, vicar of Portisham, Dorset, 1693. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Kingston, Thomas, s. Ric., of Elton, co. Huntingdon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1684, aged 18; B.A. 1688, fellow 1689, M.A. 1696, admon. at Oxford 26 Nov., 1703. See Boase, 82.
Clifford, Isaac, s. 'I.,' of Heychurch, Dorset, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 July, 1684, aged 20; B.A. 1688, vicar of Worth Matravers, Dorset, 1690. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Bastard, William, s. William, of West Allington, Devon, eq. aur. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1684-5, aged 18; of Gerston, Devon, buried at West Alvington, Devon, 16 Feb., 1703-4.
Trenhayle, Reginald, s. Reg., of St. Eard, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1684-5, aged 17, B.A. 1688; vicar of Newlyn, Cornwall, 1696. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Avant, Stephen, s. Ph., of Salcomb Regis, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1684-5, aged 14; B.A. 7 Feb., 1693-4.
Rodd, James, s. Bampfield, of Stoke-Cannon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1684-5, aged 18; of Exmouth, died s.p.
Cory, James, s. Sam., of Rattery, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 May, 1684, aged 16; brother of John 1683.
Legoe, John, s. J., of Ludgvan, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 May, 1684, aged 17, B.A. 1688.
Dilling, William, s. William, of Pinhoe, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Feb., 1684-5, aged 18.
Dingley, James, s. John, of Cuthbert, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 April, 1684, aged 18.
Richards, Daniel, s. John, of Honiton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 Feb., 1684-5, aged 25.
Bruen, Gregory, s. William, of Exeter, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 April, 1684, aged 18.

Anstis, John, s. J[ohn], of St. Neot, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1685, aged 15; bar.-at-law of the Middle Temple 1699, treasurer 1730, M.P. for St. Germain's 1702-5, St. Mawes Jan., 1711-13, Launceston 1713-15, 1715-22, treasurer of the Stannaries, Cornwall, a principal commissioner of prizes 1 Sept., 2 Q. Anne, had a patent of the reversion of Garter King of Arms (1718), 'sole contriver of the method of bringing into credit the order of the bath, which he new modelled,' governor of Bridewell and Bethlehem hospitals 1719, born at Lunna, parish of St. Neots aforesaid, 28 Sept., 1669, died 4 March, 1744-5, his son John, of Corpus, succeeded him as Garter. See Foster's Judges and Barristers; Rawlinson, i. 162, ii. 269, xvi. 80; & Noble's College of Arms.

Morton, Richard, s. R., of London, D.Med. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 March, 1685-6, aged 17; migrated to Catherine Hall, Cambridge; and created D.Med. per Literas Regias 1695, fellow college of physicians 1707, physician to Greenwich hospital April, 1716, until his death there 1 Feb. (or 3 Jan.), 1730-1. See Munk's Roll, ii. 20.

Osborn, Daniel, s. Tho., of Stoke Gabriel, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 July, 1685, aged 16; B.A. 1689, M.A. 1693, B.D. 1703; fellow 1695 until he died 12 May, 1710; buried in the college chapel; admon. at Oxford 24 May, 1710; brother of Peter 1692. See Hearne, ii. 389; Gutch, i. 120; & Boase, 85.

Webber, Francis, s. Nic., of Exeter (city), gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1685, aged 17, fellow 1688-1706, B.A. 1692, M.A. 1694; perpetual curate of Honiton Clyst, rector of Stockley Pomeroy, Devon, 1709, and canon of Exeter 1709, until his death 1737. See Boase, 82; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Borlase, John, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 July, 1685, student of Middle Temple 1685, as son and heir of John of Pendeene, Cornwall, esq.; of Pendeene and Castle Horneck, M.P. St. Ives 1705-10, died 1755, father of Walter 1712, and of William 1713. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Walsforne, Joseph, s. J., of Cold-Ashby, Northants, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 March, 1685-6, aged 15, B.A. 1689, M.A. 1692; minister of Blurton chapel 1698, and rector of Stafford St. Mary 1713 (as Walforne), until his death 29 May, 1732. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Calmady, Francis, s. Fr(ancis), of Stoke Climsland, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1685, aged 18; of Combeshead, Cornwall, admitted to the Inner Temple 1683, buried at Stoke Climsland 1 Feb., 1747. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Milles, Peter, s. Rog., of Plymouth, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1685, aged 16; B.A. 1688, M.A. 1691; vicar of St. Stephen-juxtaSaltash, Cornwall, 1705, rector of Stoke Fleming, Devon, 1714. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Keigwin, Martin, s. John, of Mousehole, Cornwall. gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Oct., 1685, aged 17; student of Gray's Inn 1693, his father "the industrious preserver of the Cornish language." See Foster's Gray's Inn Reg.

Croker, George (Crocker), s. James, of Ruon, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1685, aged 17; B.A. from New Inn Hall 1688, vicar of Duloe, Cornwall. 1699. See James 1671. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Oxenham, William, s. William, of Oxenham, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1685, aged 20, B.A. 1689; M.A. from Christ Church 1692; vicar of Spreyton, Devon, 1693. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Weston, William, s. William, of Weston, Dorset, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 Feb., 1685-6, aged 17; of Callew Weston, Dorset, student of Lincoln's Inn 1688; died 21 Oct., 1727. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Comyns, George, s. Peter, of Morchard Bishop, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1685, aged 17; B.A. 1688, M.A. 1691, rector of Doddescombsleigh, Devon, 1694. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Sweet, Elias, s. El., of Marshwood, Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1685-6, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall 13 March, 1689-90; rector of Abbas Combe, Somerset, 1693. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Kingsmill, Henry, s. John, of 'Laudleford, co. Brecon,' arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 May, 1685, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1686; his father of Sandleford, Berks. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Clare, William, s. John, of Netherbury, Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 April, 1685, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall 1688, rector of Oare, Somerset, 1698. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Reynell, Edmund, s. George, of Malston, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1685, aged 19; student of Middle Temple 1686; father of George 1711. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Morth, Jeffery, s. John, of Talland, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1685, aged 17; born 25 Dec., 1667, student of Inner Temple 1687. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Hillersdon, Richard, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 July, 1685; student of Middle Temple 1685, as son and heir of Richard, of Membland, Devon. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Woolcombe, Walter (Wollocombe), s. Rog., of Rowborough, Devon. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1685, aged 18; student of Inner Temple 1687. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Olliver, John, s. Tho., of Phillack, Cornwall, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1685, aged 18; B.A. 1690, vicar of Zennor, Cornwall, 1711. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Battishill, William, s. Peter, of Exeter, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1685, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1696. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Berenger, Richard, s. Thomas, of Iver, Bucks, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 Feb., 1685-6, aged 15; a student of Inner Temple 1689. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Strickland, Thomas, s. T., of Boynton, Yorks, bart. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Oct., 1685; brother of Walter and William.
Byles, John, s. Daniel, of Dorchester, Dorset, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Nov., 1685, aged 16; B.A. 1689.
Flood, John, s. Jo., of Cricklade, Wilts, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 March, 1685-6, aged 15; B.A. 1689.
Yeo, John, s. J., of Huntsham, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1685-6, aged 17, B.A. 1689.
Baskervile, Richard, s. Tho., of Richardston, Wilts, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Nov. 1685, aged 19.
Olliver, Joseph, s. Benjamin, of St. Thomas, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 June, 1685, aged 18.
Parr, Henry, s. H., of Cork (city), Ireland, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1685, aged 17.
Walsh, Thomas, s. Th., of Ockford, Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1685, aged 17.
Luxmoore, John, s. J., of Bratton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1685, aged 17.

Vivian, John, s. Richard, of St. Ervan, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1686-7, aged 15, fellow in 1690, B.A. 1693; rector of Otterham 1707-8, and of St. Ervan 1709-12, vicar of Colan 1712-14, and of Manaccan, (all) Cornwall, 1714-16, rector of Tiverton (Pitt portion), Devon, 1716, until his death in 1734; brother of William 1702. See Boase, 84.

Knight, Walter, s. Nathan, of Ruscomb, Berks, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 April, 1686, aged 16; student of Lincoln's Inn 1687, licenced 9 July, 1692, to marry Naomi, daughter of Letitia Blagrave, widow, of St. Giles-in-the-Fields, Middlesex, spinster. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg. & London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster.

Northcote, (Sir) Henry, s. Arthur, of King's Nympton, Devon, bart. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1686-7, aged 19; fellow 1689-1704, B.A. 1693, M.A. 1695, B.Med. 1697, D.Med. 1701, baronet in 1709; died in Feb., 1729-30; brother of John 1668. See Boase, 83.

Tredenham, Seymour, youngest son Jos., of Tregony, par. St. Tew, Cornwall, equitis. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 April, 1686, aged 16; baptised at St. Ewe 14 Jan., 1669, one of the gentlemen of the privy chamber in ordinary; died s.p. 1695-6; brother of John.

Freke, John, s. Richard, of Farringdon, Dorset, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1686-7, aged 17; B.A. 1690, rector of Steepleton Iwerne, Dorset, 1702-12, of Bellchallwell 1691, and of Fifehead Nevill 1712-31. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Harris, John, s. J., of Clether, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1686-7, aged 17, B.A. 1690; incorporated at Cambridge 1695, and M.A. from Magdalen Coll. 1695; perhaps vicar of West Anstey, Devon, 1697, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Goddard, John. s. Nic, of Osen, Wilts, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 March, 1686-7, aged 18; student of Lincoln's Inn 1690; one of these names M. P. Tregony, Cornwall, 1727, until his death 5 July, 1736. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Preston, William, s. William, of Ashton, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1686-7, aged 16; B.A. 1690, fellow 1692-5, M.A. 1694; perhaps rector of Barwick, Somerset, 1703. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Boase, 84.

Osborne, Peter, s. William, of Liskeard, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1686, aged 17; B.A. 1689, M.A. 1692, vicar of St. Goran 1695-1708, and of Liskeard, Cornwall, 1708-24. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Reade, John, s. William, of Drewsteignton, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1686, aged 18; B.A. 1690, M.A. 1693, fellow 1695-1704, vicar of Barnstaple, Devon, 1703. See Boase, 85; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Huthnance, Henry, s. H., of Gwinear, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll. matric. 16 July, 1686, aged 19; fellow 1690-5, B.A. 1692, vicar of St. Breage, Cornwall, 1697. See Boase, 83; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Stokes, Robert, s. R., of Aylesbeare, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1686-7, aged 17, B.A. 1690; vicar of Stockland, Dorset, 1696; brother of John 1672, and Thomas 1668. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Sanford, George, s. G., of Exeter, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1686-7, aged 17; B.A. 1690; M.A. from Wadham Coll. 1693; rector of Stokeinteignhead, Devon, 1704. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Bealing, George, s. G., of Gillingham, Dorset, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 March, 1686-7, aged 18; B.A. 1690, rector of Winterbourne Houghton, Dorset, 1700. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Raleigh, George (Rawlye), of Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 Oct., 1686, aged 18. B.A. 9 July, 1590; student of Inner Temple 1595, as of Exmouth, Devon. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Speccot, Humphrey, s. John, of Egloskerry, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1686, aged 16; student of Middle Temple 1687; brother of John 1680. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Donking, Roscarrock, s. Percivall, of Durham (city), cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1686-7, aged 15; bar.-at-law. Inner Temple, 1693, as Donkin. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Dill, Joseph, s. St., of Linkinhorne, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1686, aged 18; B.A. 1689, rector of St. Juste, Cornwall, 1695. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Green, John, s. Maurice, of Sarum, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1686, aged 17; B.A. 10 March, 1691-2, student of Lincoln's Inn 1686. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Painton, Shreeve, s. John, of Oxford (city), gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 May, 1686, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1687 (as Paynton). See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Pyne, William, s. Malachi, of Exeter, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Feb., 1686-7, aged 17; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1698. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Jermin, Edward, s. E., of Taunton, Somerset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1686-7, aged 19; B.A. 1690, M.A. 1693, B. and D. Med. 1714.
Crabb, Brooke, s. William, of Breminster (? Breamore), Hants, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1686-7, aged 16; B.A. 1690, M.A. 1693.
Geere, John, s. Geo., of Kenn, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 March, 1686-7, aged 17; buried at Kenn 18 Sept., 1695.
Tuthill, Joseph, s. J., of Exeter, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1686-7, aged 17, B.A. 1690, M.A. 1693.
Stephens, Richard, s. Tho., of Crantock, Cornwall, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1686, aged 18, B.A. 1690.
Vennard, Thomas, s. Hum., of Clist St. George, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1686, aged 17.
Tooker, Richard, s. John, of Milton Abbot, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 March, 1686-7, aged 20.
Seaman, Nathaniel, s. Rob., of Exeter, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1686, aged 17; B.A. 1690.
Blagdon, Charles, s. John, of Honiton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 March, 1686-7, aged 19.
Darell, Edward, s. Thomas, of Minver, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1686, aged 16.
Langford, Walter, s. William, of Exeter, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 May, 1686, aged 17.
Ferne, Thomas, s. Jo., of London, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1686, aged 17.

Wise, Thomas, s. John, of Dorchester, Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 Dec., 1687, aged 16, B.A. 1691, fellow 1694-1726, M.A. 1694, B.D. 1705, D.D. 1708; rector of St. Alphege with Northgate, Canterbury, 1709, and one of the six preachers of the cathedral, vicar of Beakesbourne, Kent, 1711, chaplain to the princess of Wales 1721, and to the duke of Ormond, canon of Lincoln 1720, until his death 24 July, 1726. See Ath. iv. 503; Boase, 84; Rawl. i. 147, and xxi. 163; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Cooke, John, s. Francis, of Exeter, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Feb., 1687-8, aged 15; B.A. 1694, M.A. 1697, fellow 1695-1705, senior proctor 1702, preb. of Exeter 1702, of Winchester 1712, died 1744, one of these names vicar of Bovey Tracey 1704, and of Harberton 1710, rector of Chilbolton, Hants, 1715, and of Bishops Waltham 1717. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus & Boase, 84.

Burges, Samuel, s. 'Josiae,' of Exeter (city), pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Feb., 1687-8, aged 16, B.A. 1691; incorp. at Cambridge 1717, M.A. from Sydney Sussex Coll. 1717, rector of Holton St. Peter, Suffolk, 1693, rector of Instow, Devon, 1695, vicar of Abbotsham 1720. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Molesworth, (Sir) John, 1s. John, of Egloshale, Cornwall, equitis. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1687, aged 18; 3rd bart.; student-at-law, Middle Temple, 1688; baptised 23 June, 1668, buried 20 June, 1723. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Rolle, Samuel, s. Denis, of Great Torrington, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 July, 1687, aged 18, B.A. 1691; bar.-at-law Middle Temple 1697; M.P. Barnstaple 1705, died 1747; see Denis 1687. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Hutchins, Richard, s. John, of Sydling St. Nicholas (Sidley), Dorset, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1687, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall 9 March, 1690-1, rector of Dorchester All Saints 1693. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Beale, William, s. William, of St. Teath, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1687, aged 18; a student of the Middle Temple 1687. See Joseph and Matthew above named. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Rolle, Denis, s. D., of Heanton, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll. matric. 24 Oct., 1687, aged 17; B.A. 1691, M.A. 1694 (as Denys), rector of Merton, Devon, 1696. See Samuel 1687, & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Deacon, John, s. J., of Burford, Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 June, 1687, aged 15; B.A. from Hart Hall 1691, rector of Great Chalfield, Wilts, 1693. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Smith, Thomas, s. T., of Exeter, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 April, 1687, aged 15, B.A. 19 Jan., 1690-1, M.A. 1693; rector of Powderham, Devon, 1700. See Foster's Index Eccl.
King, Richard, s. John, of Exeter, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1687, aged 16; B.A. 19 Jan., 1690-1, vicar of Rockbeare, Devon, 1713-18. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Clace, John, s. J., of 'S.' Clace, Cornwall, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1687, aged 17; B.A. 19 Jan., 1690-1, as Clase.
Turner, Charles, s. William, of West Harmon, Wilts, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 Dec., 1687, aged 16, B.A. 1691.
Mohun, Warwick, s. William, of Creed, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1687, aged 18.

Pennecke, John, s. J(ohn), of Breage, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 17; B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 23 Feb., 1692-3, M.A. 1695; student of Inner Temple 1690, vicar of St. Martin-juxta-Looe 1695, rector of St. Tue alias St. Ewe, Cornwall, 1701, canon 1705, and chancellor of Exeter cathedral 1706; died 15 April, 1724. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg. & Foster's Index Eccl.

Waldo, Peter, s. Dan., of Harrow-on-the-Hill, Middlesex, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 17; B.A. from Wadham Coll. 1692, chaplain 1694, M.A. 1695, (incorporated at Cambridge 1706) B. and D.D. from All Souls' Coll. 1720; rector of Aston Clinton 1716, until his death 25th, buried there 28, Jan., 1745-6. See Westminster Abbey Reg. 42; Gardiner, 364; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Rich, Edward, Earl of Warwick and Holland, s. Rob., of Westminster. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 Sept., 1688, aged 15 (subscribes "Edvardus Warwic et Holl. comes"); licenced 15 Feb., 1696-7, to marry Charlotte Middleton, of St. Clement Danes, Middlesex, and died 31 July, 1701. See London Marriage Licences, ed. Foster.

Hoblyn, Carew, s. Rob., of S. Columb, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1688, aged 18; B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 22 Feb., 1691-2; M.A. from Exeter Coll. 1694, vicar of St. Clere, Cornwall, 1696, and rector of Georgeham, Devon, 1698; brother of Edward 1671, and of Robert 1675. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Moyle, Walter, elder son Walter, of St. Germans, Cornwall, equitis. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 16; of Bake. Cornwall; student of Middle Temple 1690; M.P. Saltash 1695-8; born 3 Nov., 1672; died 9 June, 1721, aged 47, buried 13th. See Rawl. iii. 93; & Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Richards, Josiah, s. Sam, of Budleigh, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 18, B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 25 Feb., 1691-2, M.A. from Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge, 1704, rector of Bradford 1699, and of Combinteignhead, Devon, 1704. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Drake, Bampfyld, of Buckland, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 18; B.A. 22 March, 1693-4, (s. Joseph 1653), rector of Treborough, Somerset, 1696, and of Farway, Devon, 1700, buried there 20 June, 1729. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Colmer, Humphrey, s. Hugh, of Ladock, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 March, 1688-9, aged 15; B.A. 1692, M.A. 1695, B. & D.Med. 1705, fellow College of Physicians 1716, brother of Thomas 1670, and of James next named. See Munk's Roll., ii. 40.

Burnaford, Thomas, s. Thomas, of Lamerton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 March, 1688-9, aged 17; B.A. from Sydney Sussex Coll., Cambridge, 1692, M.A. 1699, incorp. July, 1699, rector of Lydford, Devon, 1701. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Snell, John, s. J., of Exeter (city), gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 April, 1688, aged 15, fellow 1690-8, B.A. 1693, M.A. 1696; vicar of Heavitree, Devon, 1698, canon of Exeter 1701, died 4 Sept., 1728. See Boase, 84; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Langworthy, Francis, s. Rich, of Loderswell, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1688, aged 19; B.A. 1692, M.A. 1696, rector of Charleton, Devon, 1714; brother of Richard 1681. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Carwithen, Thomas, s. John, of Exeter, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 April, 1688, aged 19; B.A. 1691, rector of Manaton, Devon, 1693, buried at St. Sidwells 12 Sept., 1736. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Simeon, Richard, s. R., of Bucklebury, Berks, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 15, B.A. 1692, M.A. 16 March, 1695-6; rector of Catmere, Berks, 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Mascoll, Matthew, s. James, of Paynbury, Devon, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1688, aged 17; B.A. from Wadham Coll. 1688; rector of Loxbeare, Devon, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Carter, Richard, s. R., of Ottery, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 16; B.A. 1691, rector of Lew Trenchard, Devon, 1700. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Triggs, Robert, s. R., of Lamorran, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 17, B.A. 1692; perhaps vicar of Chieveley, Berks, 1709. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Strong, Charles, s. Andr., of Crediton, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 April, 1688, aged 18, B.A. 1691, M.A. 1694; vicar of Pinhoe, Devon, 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Michell, Henry, s. Phil., of Culliton, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 19; B.A. 1691, rector of Barwick, Somerset, 1721. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Brooking, John, s. Thomas, of Totnes, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 May, 1688, aged 16; a student of the Middle Temple 1688. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Voysey, Andrew, s. Geo., of Bovey, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 19, B.A. 1691; vicar of Spreyton, Devon, 1693. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Phillipps, Gregory, s. Thom., of Phillack, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1688-9, aged 16, B.A. 1693; M.A. from St. Mary Hall 1695.
Burchill, Daniel. s. Clement, of Compton, Wilts, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1688-9, aged 15; B.A. 1692, M.A. 1695 as Burchall.
Elford, John, s. Walter, of Sheepstor, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 March, 1688-9, aged 17; buried at Sheepstor 28 Sept., 1748.
Getsius, Daniel, s. John, of Peinton, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1688, aged 20; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 1692.
Bourne, John, s. J., of Tavistocke, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 19; B.A. 14 March, 1691-2.
Fortescue, John, s. Ambrose, of Sampford Spany, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1688, aged 16.
Worth, John, s. Franc., of Exeter, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 April, 1688, aged 16, B.A. 1691.
Rose, John, s. Rich., of Halberton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 May, 1688, aged 17.
Stawell, William, s. Hugh, of Hewes, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1688, aged 19.
Wilson, Jonathan, s. J., of London, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. entry 13 June, 1688, aged 14.

Bedford, William, s. John, of Gerans, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1689, aged 22; B.A. from Hart Hall 1693, M.A. from Queen's Coll., Cambridge, 1711, vicar of Tregoney, Cornwall, 1694, rector of Ashwater, Devon, 1706, and of Gidleigh, Devon, 1712. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Edwards, Henry, s. Zechar., of Oxford, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1689, aged 16; B.A. 1693, M.A. 1696, fellow 1694-1703, in orders; perhaps rector of Wootton Fitzpaine, Dorset, 1702, vicar of Chard, Somerset, 1706, canon of Wells 1709. See Foster's Index Eccl. & Boase, 84.

Fowler, Richard, s. Edw., of Northill, Beds, S.T.D. Exeter Coll., matric. 3 May, 1689, aged 17; (and again 11 Dec., 1691, aged 20, his father then a bishop); B.A. 1 March, 1691-2, incorporated at Cambridge, M.A. from Trinity Hall 1710.
Ford, Edward, s. Tho., of Essingdon (i.e. Ilsington), Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 June, 1689, aged 17; baptised at Ilsington 12 Dec., 1671.
Pinhay, Joseph, s. Rich., of South Pool, Devon, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1689, aged 19; B.A. 1693, fellow 1693-5. See Boase, 84.
Hurrell, Charles, s. Rog., of Charlton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 May, 1689, aged 18; B.A. 17 Jan., 1692-3.
Fisher, John (?Fisler), s. J., of Sherborne, Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Nov., 1689, aged 18.
Huson, Benjamin, s. Rich., of Henstridge, Somerset, paup. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Nov., 1689, aged 17.
Stawell, Thomas, s. Hugh, of Bickington, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Nov., 1689, aged 17.
Cove, Nicholas, s. N., of Branscombe, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 May, 1689, aged 17.

Reynolds, Joshua, s. J(ohn), of St. Thomas, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 5 March, 1690-1, aged 15; fellow Corpus Christi Coll., B.A. 29 Jan., 1694-5, M.A. 26 Feb., 1697-8, B.D. 1707, rector of Stoke Charity, Hants, 1716; brother of John 1694 and of Samuel. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Martin, John, s. Jo., of Sherborne, Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 April, 1690, aged 17; fellow 1692-5, B.A. 1696, vicar of Long Burton 1696, rector of Lillington 1712, and of Folke (all in Dorset) 1713, until his death, buried there 26 Sept., 1717. See Boase, 84; & Foster's Index Eccl.
Wills, Nicholas, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 3 June, 1690; student of Middle Temple 1690, as 2s. Nicholas, of Kenton, Devon, gent.; brother of John 1695. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Willcocks, John, s. Humph., of Pinhoe, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1690, aged 17, B.A. 1693, M.A. 1696; rector of Exbourne, Devon, 1696-1758. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Long, William, s. David, of Kenn, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1690, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1691. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Hunt, Nicholas, s. Lewis, of Black Awton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 April, 1690, aged 19; vicar of Holne, Devon, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Luttrell, Southcott, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 July, 1690 (s. Southcott. of Santon Court, Devon); born 29 Sept., 1672; died 7 July, 1721.
Orchard, Thomas, s. Jo., of Eton (Eaton Hastings), Berks, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 May, 1690, aged 15; B.A. 27 Feb., 1693-4.
Mercer, Robert, s. Jo., of Ottery St. Mary, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1690, aged 16; B.A. 1693, M.A. 1696.
Comyn, John (Coming), s. Jo., of South Poole, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1690, aged 19; B.A. 1693.
Pinson, John (Pynson), s. Jon., of Tallaton, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1690, aged 18, B.A. 1693.
Pry, Richard, s. Ric., of Colebrooke, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 April, 1690, aged 16.
Hancock, William, cler. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Dec., 1690, B.A. 21 Feb., 1694-5.

Walker, John, s. Endimion, of Exeter, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 March, 1691-9, aged 17, fellow 1696-1700, B.A. 1698, M.A. 1699 (perhaps incorporated at Cambridge 1702), D.D. by diploma 7 Dec., 1714, for his book "Sufferings of the Clergy in the Grand Rebellion;" baptised at St. Kerrians, Exeter, 21 Jan., 1673-4; canon of Exeter 1714, rector of St. Mary Major in Exeter 1698, and of Upton Pyne, Devon, 1720; buried 20 June, 1747. See Rawl. ii. 9, xix. 216; Boase, 85; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Leigh, Thomas, s. Th., of Drogheda, co. Louth, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 Feb., 1691-2, aged 20, B.A. 1 March, 1691-2; perhaps scholar Trinity Coll., Dublin, and B.A. 1692, M.A. 1695. B. and D.D. 1710, incorporated 14 July, 1712, perhaps rector of Hoole, co. Lancaster, 1701. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Penleare, David, s. W., of Penzance, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 March, 1691-2, aged 18, B.A. 1696 (as Penleaze); vicar of Tysoe, co. Warwick, 1707, as Penleare; vicar of Sidbury, Devon, 1718, as Penleaze. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Birdall, Thomas (Byrdall), s. Th., of Dunchideock, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 Feb., 1691-2, aged 16, B.A. 1695; incorp. at Cambridge 1721 and M.A. from King's Coll. 1721, vicar of Dunsford, Devon, 1716. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Chilcot, Joseph, s. Rob., of Exeter, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 March, 1691-2, aged 17; B.A. 1695, rector of Trevalga, Cornwall, 1701, vicar of Up Ottery, Devon, 1702. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Crabb, Joseph, s. William, of Child-Okeford, Dorset, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 July, 1691, aged 16, B.A. 1695; M.A. from Gloucester Hall 1705, sub-librarian Bodleian. See Rawlinson, i. 272.
Newell, Christopher, s. W., of Stokenchurch, Oxon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 March, 1691-2, aged 16; B.A. 1695, M.A. 1698, rector of Beaconsfield, Bucks, 1705. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Beare, John, s. N., of Braunton, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 March, 1691-2, aged 17; B.A. 1695, M.A. 1698, B.D. 1715, a student of the Inner Temple 1692, as son of Nicholas.
Saunders, Humphrey, s. H., of Exeter, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 March, 1691-2, aged 17; B.A. 1695, M.A. 1698; vicar of Morthoe, Devon, 1699. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Potbury, John, s. Th., of Pehembury, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 March, 1691, aged 15, B.A. 1694; brother of William.
Saunders, John, s. Humph., of Exeter, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 March, 1691-2, aged 19; B.A. 1695, M.A. 1698.
Battishill, Jonathan, s. J., of Shebbeare, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 March, 1691-2, aged 18.
Maynard, Gideon, s. Chr., of Cornwood, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 Nov., 1691, aged 17.

Potter, John, s. Tho., of Breaton, Surrey (sic), pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 July, 1692, aged 16; B.A. from Lincoln Coll. 1696, M.A. 1708, vicar of Cloford 1706, canon of Wells 1718, rector of Puddimore 1719, and of Wheathill, all Somerset, 1723. See Rawl. ii. 281; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Blencow, John, s. John, of Marston, Northants, serjt.-at-law. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1692, aged 16; of Marston St. Lawrence, bar.-at-law, Inner Temple, 1697, died 19 Nov., 1740, brother of William 1697. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Mallack, Richard, s. Richard, of Axmouth, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 April, 1692, aged 16; baptised 27 March, 1675, student of Middle Temple 1692; buried at Axmouth 8 Sept., 1724. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Acland, John, s. H., of Broadclyst, Devon, baronet. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1692, aged 17; of Wooleigh, Devon, M.P. Callington 1702, until his death in his father's lifetime, buried at Broadclyst, 20 May, 1703.

Rugge, John, s. James, of Ide, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1692, aged 16, B.A. 1696; M.A. from King's Coll., Cambridge, 1702, vicar of Cannington, Somerset, 1698. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Walrond, William, s. Hen., of Tenspeare, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1692, aged 17; of Bradfield, Devon, sometime of Columpton; his will dated 21 Oct., 1745, proved 31 Jan. following.
Yard, Gilbert, s. G., of Highweeke, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 May, 1692, aged 18; one of these names M.P. Ashburton 1705, until his death in 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Oliver, Benjamin (Olliver), s. B(enjamin), of St. Thomas, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 July, 1692, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1692. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Woodley, James, s. Arth., of Aishburton, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 15 Dec., 1692, aged 20, B.A. 1696; rector of Thurloxton, Somerset, 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Blencow, John, s. J., of King Sutton, Northants, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1692, aged 19; B.A. 1696, M.A. 1699.
Angove, Abel, s. Rena., of Trevenyon, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1692, aged 19.
Carter, Elias, s. Eli, of Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1692-3, aged 18; B.A. 1696.
Ham, John, s. William, of Uplowman, Devon, gent., Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1692, aged 20.
Phillipps, Samuel, s. Tho., of Poughill, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Nov., 1692, aged 19.
Willes, John, s. J., of Rackenford, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 May, 1692, aged 16.

Burton, Littleton, s. Lit(tleton), gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 April, 1693, aged 17; B.A. from St. Edmund Hall 1696, M.A. 1699, born in Jan., 1676, entered Merchant Taylors' School 1686, rector of Credenhill, co. Hereford, 1713, and of Llangeler, co. Carmarthen, 1732. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Rennell, Thomas, s. Th., of Chudleigh, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 April, 1693, aged 18; B.A. 1696, fellow 1698-1713, M.A. 1699, B.D. 27 Jan., 1710-11, D.D. 9 Feb., 1710-11, rector of Drewsteignton, Devon, 1711-53. See Rawl. ii. 64; Boase, 86; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Crews, Richard, s. William, of Gerrance, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 Nov., 1693, aged 18, B.A. 1697; incorp. at Cambridge 1717 as Crews, M.A. from Pembroke Coll. 1717, vicar of St. Gennis, Cornwall, 1712, as Crews.

Beard, Nathaniel, s. Nathaniel, of Exeter, Devon, gent, Exeter Coll., matric. 24 March, 1693-4, aged 17; B.A. 1697; M.A. from Emanuel Coll., Cambridge, 1710, vicar of Tavistock, Devon, 1701. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Ollyffe, John, s. Jo., of Almer, Dorset, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 March, 1693-4, aged 18; B.A. 1697, M.A. 1700, rector of Hedgerley 1699-1743. See Rawl. iii. 349, and xviii. 161a; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Parr, Thomas, s. Joh., of Aishcombe, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 March, 1693-4, aged 17; B.A. 1697, M.A. 1700, rector of North Bovey, Devon, 1705. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Nance, Chester, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 April, 1693; student of Middle Temple 1692, as son and heir of John, of Cornwall, esq. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Richards, Edward, s. R., of Collingbourne, Wilts, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 Nov., 1693, aged 17; B.C.L. 1699.
Slade, John, s. George, of Careas, Cornwall, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 March, 1693-4, aged 18, B.A. 1697.
White, Jerome, s. Jo., of Helland, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 Feb., 1693-4, aged 15, B.A. 1697.
Cleeve, Joseph (Cleave), s. Ri., of Crediton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 22 March, 1693-4, aged 18.
Hurse, John, s. Jo., of Chadley, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 April, 1693, aged 18.
Clayton, Robert, s. Ro., of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 1 June, 1693, aged 17.
Tulley, Gilbert, s. G., of Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 April, 1693, aged 17.

Lewis, John, s. Joh., of Worcester (city), pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 March, 1694, aged 18; B.A. 1697; M.A. from Corpus Christi Coll., Cambridge, 1712 (grandson of Francis, vicar of Worth, isle of Purbeck, Dorset); born 29 Aug., 1675, curate of Acrise, Kent, and rector 1699, vicar of St. John Baptist, als. Mergate, isle of Thanet, 1705, rector of Eastbridge and of Saltwood-cumHythe, Kent, 1706, vicar of Minster, isle of Thanet, 1709-46, master of the hospital of Eastbridge, Canterbury; died 16 Jan., 1746-7; wrote a history of the isle of Thanet, etc. See Rawl. i. 339, iii. 134, v. 385, and xviii. 18; Gent's. Mag. 1747, p. 47; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Furseman, John, s. Richard, of Lamerton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 March, 1694, aged 15; B.A. 1697, M.A. 24 March, 1706-7, born at Lamerton 24 Aug., 1678, rector of Trevalga, Cornwall, 1704, official of Cornwall 1714, vicar of Lamerton 1718, rector of Lawhitton 1723, canon residentiary of Exeter 1723, subdean 1727, chancellor 1731; died 9 Dec., 1757; will proved 14th. See Rawl. v. 450, vi. 276, xvii. 148; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Granger, Edmund, s. Tho., of Lamerton, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 30 March, 1694, aged 17; B.A. 1697, fellow 1698-1710, M.A. 1700, vicar of Bramford Speke 1708, and rector of Cruwys Morchard, Devon, 1709, until his death, buried there 21 Jan., 1737-8. See Boase, 86; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Lane, John, s. Josi., of Banbury, Oxon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1694-5, aged 16; B.A. 1698, M.A. 1701, B. and D.Med. 1708; perhaps licenced to practice medicine 1 July, 1700. See preceding entry.

Edgcombe, Richard, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1694-5, aged 17, B.A. 1698; (s. Richard, of Edgcumbe, Devon), rector of Kelly, Devon, 1702, until his death 9 June, 1724. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Marker, Richard, s. Henr., of Ottery St. Mary, Devon, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1694-5, aged 17; B.A. 1698, M.A. 1701, vicar of Bradford, Somerset, 1711. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Mayne, Samuel, s. Zac., of Dalwood, Dorset, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1694-5, aged 17; B.A. 1698, M.A. 1701; B. Med. from New Inn Hall 1708; died in Northampton 1750.
Marwood, Robert, s. Joh., of Bear, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Oct., 1694, aged 16; of Cookshayes, Devon; died 13 July, 1733, buried in Widworthy church.
Raven, William, of Farnham, Dorset, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 July, 1694, aged 18, B.A. 1698; rector of Farnham, Dorset, 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Tucker, Cornelius, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1694-5, aged 18, B.A. 1698; rector of Eggesford, Devon, 1703. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Symons, Richard, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1694-5 aged 16, B.A. 1698; vicar of Northam, Devon, 1701. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Raynes, Gervis, s. Edw., of Ordsall, Notts, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 4 Dec., 1694, aged 16; B.A. 1 Feb., 1698-9.
Simeon, Edmund, s. Ric., of Bucklebury, Berks, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1694-5, aged 16, B.A. 1698.
Prideaux, Edmond, s. Ed., of Exeter (city), arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 19 May, 1694, aged 18.
Harris, John, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 March, 1694-5; B.A. 16 Feb., 1698-9.
Cook, John, arm, Exeter Coll., matric. 30 March, 1694.

Shortrudge, Robert, s. Phil., of "Thanbridge" (Thelbridge, Devon), gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 May, 1695, aged 17, B.A. 17 Jan., 1698-9, fellow 1701-19, M.A. 14 Feb., 1701-2, B.D. 1713; rector of Clannaborough 1707 and of Down St. Mary, Devon, 1717. See Boase, 86; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Rous, Robert, s. R(obert), of Exeter, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll. 10 April, 1690, aged 17; B.A. from Pembroke Coll. 1693, fellow Exeter Coll. 1695-1715, M.A. 1696, B.D. 1707, rector of Offwell, Devon, 1713. See Boase, 85; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Courtenay, William, of Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 May, 1695, aged 15; possibly Sir William (son of Francis), of Powderham, Devon, 2nd baronet, M.P. 1701-10, and June, 1712, until his death 6 Oct., 1735. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.
Churchward, William, s. James, of Stoke Gabriel, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 April, 1695, aged 18; B.A. 16 Feb., 1698-9, rector of Goodleigh, Devon, 1712. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Sprigge, Nathan, s. Joh., of Exeter, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 May, 1695, aged 17; B.A. 9 March, 1698-9, vicar of North Molton, Devon, 1705. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Limbear, Thomas, s. Christopher, of Berry Narber, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 May, 1695, aged 18; student of Middle Temple 1696. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Lockyer, Nicholas, s. Nic., of Honiton, Devon, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1695, aged 18; B.A. 1699, vicar of Luppitt, Devon, 1705. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Jennings, William, s. William, of St. Garnetts, Cornwall, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 April, 1695, aged 20.

Pennington, William, s. Christopher, of Bodmin, Cornwall, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 March, 1696-7, aged 15; B.A. 1701, prebend in Endelian collegiate church, Cornwall, 1716, vicar of Davidstowe, Cornwall, 1717-38; perhaps brother of Edward 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Paynter, Thomas, s. Fran., of Boskenna, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 12 Dec., 1696, aged 16; fellow 1698-1704, B.A. 1708, vicar of Gwinear, Cornwall, 1711; buried 26 May, 1732; brother of Arthur 1703. See Boase, 86; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Orchard, Thomas, s. William, of Hartland, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 Oct., 1696, aged 18; B.A. 1700, M.A. 1703; vicar of Launcelles, Cornwall, 1712, and rector of Holsworthy, Devon, 1713. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Braddon, John, s. Nic., of Llancells, Cornwall, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 March, 1696-7, aged 17; B.A. from All Souls' Coll. 17 Oct., 1700, rector of Luffincott, Devon, 1713. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Reynolds, John, s. Joh., of Great Torrington, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 May, 1696, aged 18; B.A. 1 Feb., 1699-1700; incorporated at Cambridge 1706, and B.Med. from Trinity Coll., Cambridge, 1706.
Trenhay(l)e, James, s. Reginald, of Penzance, Cornwall, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 24 Oct., 1696, aged 17, B.A. 1700 (as John Trenhayl); rector of Gerrans, Cornwall, 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Bracegirdle, Joseph (Brasegirdle), s. Joseph, of Quinton, Northants, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 June, 1696, aged 14; demy Magdalen Coll. 1698-1706, B.A. 1701, M.A. 1704. See Bloxam, vi. 136.
Neale, Philip, s. Phi., of East Allington, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1696, aged 17; B.A. 1699, M.A. 1702, vicar of Blackawton, Devon, 1732, as Neyle. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Maye, Joseph, s. Jos., of St. Tue, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 Oct., 1696, aged 17, B.A. 1700; perhaps rector of St. Juste, Cornwall, 1710-12, etc. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Warmington, Nicholas, s. John, of Poundstock, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1696-7, aged 16, student of Middle Temple 1697. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Earle, Thomas, s. John, of Llancells, Cornwall, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1696-7, aged 18; B.A. 1700, vicar of Northiam, Devon, 1704. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Martyn, John, s. William, of Plymouth, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 May, 1696, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1698. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Downe, Henry, s. John, of Barnstaple, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1696-7, aged 17; of the Inner Temple 1697. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Potbury, William, s. Tho., of Pyhembury, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 July, 1696, aged 17, B.A. 1700; brother of John.
Peach, Michael, s. George, of Holberton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 21 March, 1696, aged 18; B.A. 1699, M.A. 1712.
Conantt, Philip, s. Joh., of Colaton Rawley, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 3 Feb., 1696-7, aged 17, B.A. 1700.
Holmes, Jonas, s. Jon., of Cruwys Morchard, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1696, aged 15, B.A. 1699.
Moore, Joseph, s. Jos., of Pancras-Wyke, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1696, aged 18; B.A. 1699.
Wood, William, s. William, of Colomb, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 April, 1696, aged 15, B.A. 1699.
Pearson, Vyvyan, s. James, of Chilton, Wilts, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1696, aged 15; B.A. 1699.
Penkevell, Benjamin, s. Rich., of Llangasty, co. Brecon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 March, 1696-7, aged 18.
Harris, John, s. Peter, of Saltash, Cornwall, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 2 April, 1696, aged 21; B.A. 1699.
Marshall, Joseph, s. Jos., of Exeter (city), Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 March, 1696, aged 18.
Mallett, William, s. Hug., of Iddesleigh, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 May, 1696, aged 17.

Gee, William, s. Nath., of Tavistock, Devon, pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 May, 1697, aged 18; B.A. 18 Jan., 1700-1; M.A. from Sidney Sussex Coll., Cambridge., 1710, vicar of Walkhampton, Devon, 1713, and of St. Winnow, Cornwall, 1728. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Williams, William, s. William, of Bodinnick, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 26 Nov., 1697, aged 16, fellow 1700-19, B.A. 1703, M.A. 1706, proctor 1710, B. and D.Med. 1711; practiced physic at Exeter. See Boase, 86.
Carslake, Abraham, s. Joh., of Sidmouth, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 March, 1697-8, aged 17; B.A. 1701, M.A. 1704, B.Med. 1708, physician in H.M.'s fleet 1709. See Munk's Roll, ii. 26.
Baron, John, s. William, of Egloskerry, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 March, 1697-8, aged 17; B.A. 1701, fellow 1703-13, M.A. 1704, rector of Duloe, Cornwall, 1705. See Boase, 87.
Acland, Richard (Ackland), s. Ric., of Barnstaple, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 May, 1697, aged 17; one of these names M.P. Barnstaple 1708-13 (? of Fremington, Devon).
Bale, Christopher, s. Christopher, of Exeter (city), arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1697-8, aged 17; a student of the Middle Temple 1698. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Woolcombe, John, s. Joh., of Yarnton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 June, 1697, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1698. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
White, Nicholas, s. N., of Certon, Devon, p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1697, aged 15; B.A. 1701, M.A. 1704.
Hancock, William, s. William, of St. Germans, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 20 May, 1697, aged 17.
Tan(n)er, Theodore, s. Sam., of Farringdon, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 3 July, 1697, aged 18.

Reynolds, Samuel, s. John, of St. Thomas, near Exeter, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 6 Dec., 1698, aged 17; B.A. from Corpus Christi Coll. 1702; fellow Balliol Coll., M.A. 1705, master of Plympton grammar school; father of Sir Joshua, president of the Royal Academy, who died 23 Feb., 1792, brother of John 1693, and of Joshua 1691.

Bradford, John, s. J., of Newton St. Cyres, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1698, aged 18; B.A. 1701, M.A. 1704, rector of Newton St. Cyres, 1704-28, vicar of St. Thomas the Apostle, Exeter, in 1728. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Morice, (Sir) Nicholas, s. William, of Werrington, Devon, bart. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 April, 1698, aged 17; 2nd bart., M.P. Newport (Cornwall) in 7 parliaments 1702, until his death 27 Jan., 1725-6. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Remphrey, John, s. Gilbert, of Sherwill, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1698-9, aged 18; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 15 March, 1702-3, rector of Stoke Rivers 1705, and of Brendon, Devon, 1706. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Cunningham, Edmund, s. Joh., of Tavistock, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1698-9, aged 17, B.A. 1702; M.A. from New Inn Hall 1705, rector of Stockleigh Pomeroy, Devon, 1707. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Lewis, Hugh, s. H., of Slimbridge, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1698-9, aged 18; B.A. 3 Feb., 1702-3, M.A. 1710, vicar of Ottery St. Mary 1713, of Broadhembury, Devon, 1714. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Smith, James (Smyth), s. James, of Torrington, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1698, aged 16; student of Inner Temple 1699; possibly M.P. Taunton (Aug.) 1715-27. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Arscott, John (or Ascott), s. J., of Tetcott, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 14 April, 1698, aged 16; of the Inner Temple 1700, buried at Tetcott, 22 Dec., 1701. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Dynham, Richard (Dinham), s. Philip, of Blisland, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1698, aged 17; B.A. 1701, vicar of Poundstock, Cornwall, 1718. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Barter, William, s. G. (? 'Gul'), of Exeter (city), p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1698-9, aged 18; B.A. 1702, rector of St. Edmond's in Exeter 1708. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Martyn, William, s. Nic., of Heavitree, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 Oct., 1698, aged 17; student of Middle Temple 1700; his father of Oxton. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Fitz Geffry, Charles, s. Alex., of Tamerton, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 31 May, 1698, aged 18; B.A. 16 Jan., 1701-2.
Hippisley, Richard, s. John, of Lamborne, Berks, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 Oct., 1698, aged 18; B.A. 1702, M.A. 1705.
Sommers, Thomas, s. Joh., of Marwood, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 March, 1698-9, aged 16, B.A. 1702, M.A. 1705.
Jones, Evan, s. Nic., of Pembrin, co. Card., pp. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 April, 1698, aged 17; B.C.L. 5 Feb., 1709-10.
Smith, William, s. Rob., of Heavitree, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 May, 1698, aged 18, B.A. 16 Jan., 1701-2.
Bettenson, William, s. G. (? 'Gul'), of Lesneuth, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1698, aged 18.
Simeon, Daniel, s. Ric., of Newberry, Berks, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1698, aged 17, B.A. 1701.
Beetham, Thomas, s. Edward, of Newby Stones, Westmorland. Exeter Coll., matric. 9 Nov., 1698, aged 18.
Orchard, John, s. Nic., of Redriffe, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 16 April, 1698, aged 17.
Clarke, John, s. J., of St. Domin, Cornwall, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1698-9, aged 17.
Lome, Francis, cler. fil. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1698, aged 17; B.A. 1701, M.A. 1704.
Harris, John, s. J., of Plymouth, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Nov., 1698, aged 18.
Rolle, Denis, s. Joh., of London, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 7 April, 1698, aged 16.

Thorne, James, s. John, of South Molton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1699-1700, aged 17, fellow 1707-27, B.A. 21 Feb., 1703-4, M.A. 1707; student of Inner Temple 1700, rector of Harnhill, co. Gloucester, 1715, of Heath, Oxon, 1723, and of St. Ive, Cornwall, 1725-40. See Boase, 87; & Foster's Index Eccl.

Baker, Samuel, s. Phil., of Manxon, Hants, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 18; B.A. 1702, rector of Sherbourne St. John, Hants, 1701-2, vicar of Worth Matravers, Dorset, 1708-14, rector of Laverstoke, Hants, 1715-30, and of Lasham 1730. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Malet, Baldwin, s. B., of St. Audry, Somerset, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1699-1700, aged 16; B.A. 1703, M.A. 1708 (as Baldwin Childe), rector of Street, Somerset, 1718-58, vicar of Doulting, Somerset, 1735-68; brother of William 1698. See Gardiner, 399.

Langdon, Gilbert, s. Tob., of Exeter city, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 18, B.A. from St. Mary Hall 1702; M.A. from Trinity Coll., Cambridge, 1709, prebendary of collegiate church of Endellion, Cornwall, 1713. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Herle, Edward, s. Nic., of Lezant, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 17; sheriff of Cornwall 1713, M.P. Launceston 1713, until his death 14 April, 1721; brother of Nicholas. See Foster's Parliamentary Dictionary.

Pett, Phineas, s. P., of Penton, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 18; B.A. 1702; M.A. from Oriel Coll. 1705, vicar of Walberton 1709, rector of Ford 1715, vicar of Yapton, Sussex, 1719. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Orchard, Paul, s. Charles, of Kilkhampton, Cornwall, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1699, aged 17; student of the Inner Temple 1700, M.P. Camelford (May), 1711-13, Bossiney (March), 1714-15. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Blake, George, s. Tho., of Alwington, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1699-1700, aged 16; B.A. 1703, fellow 1704-5, M.A. 1706, rector of Alwington 1713-63, died 1767. See Boase, 87; & Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Fincher, Richard, s. James, of Llanteglos, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1699-1700. aged 18; B.A. 1703, fellow 1705-7, M.A. 1706, vicar of St. Veryan, Cornwall, 1706, until his death 1724. See Boase, 87.

Brice, John, s. George, of North Petherton, Somerset pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1699-1700, aged 17 (called Price in Mat. Reg.); B.A. 1703, rector of Aisholt, Somerset, 1707. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Clare, George, s. William, of (Clyst) St. George, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 17; B.A. 1702, rector of Ashbury, Devon, 1704, brother of Ambrose 1691. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Pearse, Arthur, s. Joh., of Botus Fleming, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1699-1700, aged 18; B.A. 26 Feb., 1703-4 (as Pearce), rector of Botus Fleming, Cornwall, 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Dunning, Richard, s. Joh., of Waite Church (Whitchurch), Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1699-1700, aged 15; B.A. 1703, M.A. 1706, rector of Meavy, Devon, 1716. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Hawkins, Henry s. Phil, of Creed, Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1699-1700, aged 15; possibly student of Inner Temple 1706, as of St. Austell, Cornwall, gent. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Bishop, Robert, s. Joh., of St. Columb, Cornwall, cler., Exeter Coll., matric. 23 March, 1699-1700, aged 15; B.A. 1703, M.A. 1706, rector of St. Pinnock, Cornwall, 1707. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.
Sanford, Thomas, s. Th., of Thorverton, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1699, aged 18, B.A. 1703; vicar of Sancreed, Cornwall, 1709; brother of Richard 1705. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Wills, Richard, s. John., of Rackenford, Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 11 May, 1699, aged 18, B.A. 3 Feb., 1702-3; rector of Gidleigh, Devon, 1711. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Yarde, James, s. Gilb., of King Stanton, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1699-1700, aged 16, B.A. 1703; rector of Puncknoll, Dorset, 1707. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Cholwich, John, s. John, of Faringdon, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1699-1700, aged 16; bar.-at-law. Middle Temple, 1705. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Wilcocks, Thomas, s. Rob., of Pin(hoe), Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 18; B.A. from New Inn Hall15 March, 1702-3, incorporated at Cambridge 1704.
Pearse, William, pauper. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, B.A. 1704, M.A. 1705; perhaps rector of Preston Bissett, Bucks, 1736-49. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Rodde, Bampfyld, s. B., of Fulford, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 17; of the Rodd, co. Hereford, and of Stoke Canon, Devon; died 1725.
Weekes, John, s. J., of Exeter (city), pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 Feb., 1699-1700, aged 18, B.A. from St. Mary Hall 24 March, 1703-4.
Welch, John, s. William, of Langton, Dorset, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 18, B.A. 1702, as William.
Bickford, Nathaniel, s. Joh., of Bickington, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 18; B.A. 1702.
Willyams, Charles, s. Hugh, of Roseworthy, Cornwall, pleb. p.p. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1699, aged 18.
Waddon, John, s. Tho., of Morwinstow Cornwall, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1699-1700, aged 17.
Weekes, Richard, s. R., of Pool, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 18, B.A. 1702.
Wheeler, Jonathan, s. J., of Ringwood, Hants, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 10 Dec., 1699, aged 18.
Bidgood, John, s. Hum., of Tiverton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 27 March, 1699, aged 17.
Rose, Thomas, s. Ric., of Wootton, Dorset, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 28 March, 1699, aged 18.
Bayly, John, s. J., gent., 'Hiber Nat.' Exeter Coll., matric. 11 May, 1699, aged 17.

Yarde, Gilbert, s. G(ilbert), of Exeter (city), gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 25 June, 1700, aged 17, B.A. 1704, fellow 1706-17; M.A. 20 Jan., 1706-7; a student of the Middle Temple 1700; rector of Bickleigh, Devon, 1722-40. See Boase, 87; & Foster's Inns of Court Reg.

Stucley, Lewis, s. L(ewis), of Bideford, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1700-1, aged 16; bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1707, bencher 1740; buried in the Temple church Monday, 18 July, 1748; brother of Dennis. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.

Hake, Henry, s. Joh., of Plimstock, Devon, pleb. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1700-1, aged 16; B.A. 1704, vicar of Bodmin, Cornwall, 1716, rector of Botus Fleming 1722, vicar of Kingston-byTaunton, Somerset, 1731. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Butter, Robert, s. James, of Colyton, Devon, pleb. (altered to 'cler.'). Exeter Coll., matric. 7 May, 1700, aged 20; B.A. from St. Mary Hall 24 March, 1703-4, rector of Broadmayne, Dorset, 1708. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Colley, James, s. Tho., of 'Georgeham,' Devon, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1700-1, aged 18; B.A. 1704, rector of Martinhoe 1709, and of Loxhore & Parracombe 1720, all in Devon. See Foster's Index Ecclesiasticus.

Yard, Hugh, s. William, of Kingsteignton, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1700-1, aged 17, B.A. 1704, M.A. 1707; rector of Ashton, Devon, 1718, until his death in 1754. See Foster's Index Eccl.

Simpkin, Gilbert (Symkin), s. Joh., of London, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 May, 1700, aged 16; of Plymouth and Bristol; student of Middle Temple 1702; died 15 May, 1744. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Eastchurch, Henry, s. John, of Bishopstanton (? tawton or teignton), Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 18 June, 1700, aged 16; a student of Middle Temple 1700. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
Gilbert, John (Gylbert), s. Humph., of Marldon, Devon, arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1700-1, aged 17; baptised at Marldon 21 Feb., 1683-4; died 13 June, 1733; brother of Humphrey 1702.
Waddon, Richard, s. R(ichard), of Plimpton Morris, Devon, gent. Exeter Coll., matric. 13 March, 1700-1, aged 16, bar.-at-law, Middle Temple, 1707. See Foster's Judges and Barristers.
Nanson, Philip, s. Phil., of Newnham, Hants, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 8 July, 1700, aged 16; B.A. 1704. M.A. 1707, vicar of Ilsington, Devon, 1715. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Tingcombe, Nathaniel, s. N., of Foy, Cornwall, cler. Exeter Coll., matric. 17 Dec., 1700, aged 19, B.A. 1704; vicar of Davidstow, Cornwall, 1708. See Foster's Index Eccl.
Vincent, Walter, s. Henr., of Mevagissey, Cornwall. arm. Exeter Coll., matric. 29 Nov., 1700, aged 16; a student of Lincoln's Inn 1699. See Foster's Inns of Court Reg.
